programme.title: The Last Duel (2021)
programme.desc: In medieval France, squire Jacques Le Gris secures a captaincy destined for knight Jean de Carrouges. To rub salt into fresh wounds, Jacques' promotion includes land intended for his rival. Jean canters off to war and returns to his wife Marguerite, who claims she was sexually assaulted by Jacques. Ridley Scott's epic drama based on a book by Eric Jager, starring Adam Driver, Jodie Comer, and Matt Damon and Ben Affleck (who also worked on the screenplay)

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Amy Gledhill gets creative with a series of spoons. Kumail Nanjiani impresses everyone with his extraordinarily strong jaw and Alex Horne causes Joanna Page to scream in such terror that it sparks alarm in the local area. Armando Iannucci douses a coconut in vinegar, while Joel Dommett slathers another in glue. Greg Davies hands out the points

programme.title: How to Build a Girl (2019)
programme.desc: A 16-year-old living in Wolverhampton finds comfort in placing portraits of her media idols covering her bedroom wall. She dreams of escaping her humdrum circumstances by becoming a writer, and manages to secure a trial as a music journalist. Eager to reinvent herself, she adopts a new style, bright red hair and an outlandish pen name. In due course she realises that cruel reviews offer a pathway to success allowing her to support her family financially. Drama based on Caitlin Moran's memoir, with Beanie Feldstein, Cleo and Donal Finn

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay is in Redondo Beach, California, for the first of two visits to Zayna Flaming Grill, a Mediterranean restaurant owned and run by aunt and niece Faye and Brenda. Faye believes she has the weight of the entire restaurant on her shoulders, while Brenda feels she isn't treated as an equal in the business. With tensions rising, the food not up to scratch and everyone playing the blame game, the chef is faced with one of the trickiest situations he's ever encountered

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition begins at stately home Anstey Hall in Cambridge, with father and son team John and Johnny de Bruyne. The fun starts with a character-revealing afternoon of goose-herding, before the participants dress to impress at a formal dinner. John recounts stories of royal connections - which fails to impress hotel managers Mark and Layla. In the morning, as they tuck in to a self-service breakfast, guest Tim decides that DIY doesn't work at Anstey Hall, but when he notes this on his feedback form, John and Johnny accuse him of game-playing

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit of the competition is to clothes-free Clover Spa and Hotel in Birmingham, where owner Tim Higgs hopes to convert his rivals to the joys of naturism. Judging with an extra critical eye are John and Jonny De Bruyne, who received negative feedback from Tim, and a thorough room inspection reveals a dusty porn DVD. Tim tries to encourage his nervous guests to take part in a naked spa experience, but John opts to watch television instead. When feedback is invited, Tim is delighted to discover Mark and Layla would stay again but shocked by the 'porn film' discovery

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants travel to the Angel Hotel in Coleford, Gloucestershire for the third day of the competition, where a treasure hunt organised by hosts Mark and Layla brings out their guests' competitive sides. Meanwhile, there is confusion at breakfast and Layla's manners are criticised

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final stay is at Higher Gitcombe in Totnes, Devon, where owners Paul and Lynnie Jolly set out to spoil their guests. Everyone is overwhelmed by the added extras, but naturist Tim is put off by cushions and clutter. After a masterclass in Nordic walking, Lynnie serves up a veg smoothie, which unhealthy eaters Mark and Layla dubiously down in one. Over dinner, Tim challenges his host's organic 'niche'. And Layla, still smarting from his negative feedback, labels him 'weird, naked Tim'. At breakfast, guests are wary as Tim's order goes wrong and Jonny and Layla engage in an eating competition. When feedback is invited, the Jollys are affronted by accusations of special treatment and vow to put the record straight

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: On the final day of the competition, the owners of Anstey Hall, the Clover Spa and Hotel, the Angel Hotel and Higher Gitcombe meet for the last time to find out what they have been paid and settle some scores. Having aired their issues, the winners are announced

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Danny does some gardening work for Carrie's gynaecologist - but she thinks the doctor might refuse to see her as a patient when she learns how much her friend overcharged him. Guest starring Judge Reinhold

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Carrie hears her law firm is laying people off and begins to worry about her job, while Doug lands himself in the doghouse by losing Deacon's lucky ball. American comedy, starring Kevin James, Leah Remini and Victor Williams

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Carrie cooks Thanksgiving dinner for 10 people, while Doug takes pity on a stranger who has been left waiting for a lift - but his good intentions backfire. With Leah Remini and Kevin James

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Carrie is made unemployed and initially shows no inclination to find another job. Finally stung into action by a confrontation with Doug, she decides to join Arthur in a new business venture - making mobile phone covers

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray and Debra try to conceal an embarrassing accident by telling Frank they fell down the stairs, sending him into a DIY frenzy that puts him in hospital

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra and Marie hatch an elaborate plan to get Amy back with Robert - but only succeed in driving her into the arms of an all-too-eager Gianni

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: The Barones watch Geoffrey having trouble getting the hang of a game, but Ray learns the hard way that his son's lack of ability should not interfere with his enjoyment

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra's divorced parents join the Barones for Thanksgiving - but her father puts a damper on the festivities by bringing a date. Comedy, starring Ray Romano, Patricia Heaton, Brad Garrett and Doris Roberts

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The prospect of Christmas with his son Frederick leaves Frasier panicking about what presents to buy him, and it takes a reminder from Martin about the festive spirit to keep him on the right track

programme.title: Frasier
programme.sub-title: It's Hard to Say Goodbye If You Won't Leave
programme.desc: The psychiatrist realises the true depth of his feelings for station manager Kate, only for her to announce she is moving to Chicago. Kelsey Grammer and Mercedes Ruehl star

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The psychiatrist suddenly realises he has a shortage of friends in Seattle, as most of his old ones are back in Boston. He announces on air he is looking for companionship and gets a lot more than he bargained for. Guest starring Griffin Dunne, with Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Joe spends the night in Daphne's room, causing a shocked Frasier's mind to work overtime and Niles to become consumed by jealousy. Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce star

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Mr Burns realises he has no heir and decides to hold auditions, intending to choose one from the children of Springfield. Unfortunately, only Bart comes close to fitting the bill

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer begins to believe Ned Flanders may not be so bad after all, and starts hanging around with him - but his friendliness and good cheer are not reciprocated for long

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart wins a competition and becomes the lucky owner of a fully grown elephant, which proceeds to eat his hard-up family out of house and home

programme.title: 10 Things I Hate About You (1999)
programme.desc: Lively teenager Bianca is not allowed to start dating until her man-hating sister Kat does first - but no boy is brave enough to ask her out. However, Bianca's would-be boyfriend thinks he has found the perfect man for the job in the shape of a quirky loner with a mysterious past. Comedy, based on Shakespeare's The Taming of the Shrew, starring Heath Ledger, Julia Stiles, Joseph Gordon-Levitt and Larisa Oleynik

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: This week's competition kicks off at The Sportsman in Whitworth, Lancashire, where Steve and Georgia are hoping to win over their guests with bargain rooms and big breakfasts

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Sarah hosts the second visit of the week at Lahtle Wood Glamping in North Yorkshire, where she is joined in her duties by her sister-in-law, also called Sarah. The B&Bers find themselves cooing over the cabins when they pitch up, but Steve and Georgia aren't sure about the value. After a visit to an old air raid shelter, Steve drops some truth bombs on the other B&Bers about what he really thinks about the accommodation. Come feedback time, the Sarahs contend with some difficult comments about prices

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Joe hosts the third visit of the week, at the stately, Grade II listed Cley Hall Hotel in Lincolnshire. The B&Bers find themselves steeped in history, before letting out some anger as they try out blacksmithing but a noisy night drives Paul to distraction, and both the Sarahs get a little too hot under the collar

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The last visit of the week is to Bumble Barn Luxury B&B in Norfolk, where professional chef Paul and co-worker Debbie are looking to cook up a storm. Following a history lesson at an RAF museum, Paul indulges his guests by namedropping some of the illustrious people he's cooked for in the past. With expectations through the roof for breakfast, the pressure is on for him to deliver. However, some brutal feedback leaves Paul sharpening his extensive collection of knives ahead of Payment Day

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Payment Day sees backstabbing, blazing barneys, explosive confrontations and plenty of vendettas to settle. Steve and Georgia aren't happy with their breakfast scores, the Sarahs are angry about their hot tub's frosty reception, Joe's tossing and turning about his sleep scores, and Paul is ready to take everyone to task about some low blows in his feedback. When the dust settles, the winner is finally revealed

programme.title: Jamie's Ultimate BBQ
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver shares more barbecue ideas, serving up a butterflied leg of lamb with herby breadcrumb crust, accompanied by creamy beans and leeks - all cooked directly on the coals. He then makes spiced chicken kebabs and creamy butter sauce, grilled fish tacos, paired with a charred fruit salsa, and his tear-and-share vegetable pancake

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Steam Train Diaries
programme.desc: Paul Middleton is on the footplate of a North Yorkshire Moors Railway locomotive, travelling between the picturesque stops of Goathland and Levisham. Meanwhile, iconic engine Tornado is brought in on a mission to boost passenger numbers, the lineside team are in action monitoring the UK's only venomous snake, and we see how a Victorian loom is keeping heritage railways all over the world running smoothly

programme.title: World's Most Secret Hotels
programme.desc: Featuring a South African nature reserve, Classic railway carriages repurposed as a luxury hotel in Kent, and curious submarine accommodation in the Scottish Highlands. An old freight crane is reborn as a harbour-side hotel in Hamburg, and there's a retro retreat in Utah, featuring wagons that never roll

programme.title: The Equalizer 2 (2018)
programme.desc: Robert McCall divides his time between cab driving and looking after a young man who is mixing with a bad crowd. When a CIA friend is murdered, the former black ops agent sets out to avenge her death, and winds up fighting for survival in his hurricane-battered home town. Action thriller, starring Denzel Washington, Pedro Pascal and Ashton Sanders

programme.title: Glass (2019)
programme.desc: An invulnerable vigilante battles a murderer with multiple personalities - only for both to be apprehended and transferred to a psychiatric hospital. They find themselves under the care of a sinister doctor who has plans concerning their unique abilities, but also sharing the facility with a third patient, a criminal mastermind the crime fighter had encountered before, and who is soon manipulating everyone to his own ends. M Night Shyamalan's fantasy thriller, crossing over the characters from his earlier films Unbreakable and Split. Starring James McAvoy, Bruce Willis and Samuel L Jackson

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Rosaria bought Bella Luna to realise her son Gianfranco's ambition to become a chef, but the Italian restaurant's future looks bleak due to his lack of experience in the kitchen combined with her refusal to acknowledge the eatery's many flaws. Gordon Ramsay heads to Easton, Pennsylvania, to help the troubled pair and save the business from financial disaster

programme.title: Your Song
programme.desc: Sam Ryder and Paloma Faith take the chosen singers into the studio to rehearse for the final concert. But first, they decide to include a fifth singer. Who should they bring back? As the practice sessions begin, Milo must learn to be bigger on stage, Chantel battles with self-doubt, Findlay rehearses his mum's funeral song a year after her death and Mina starts losing her voice the day before the concert. Alison Hammond follows their progress

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When a romantic night ends in injury, Marge recovers by taking up kite boarding, while Homer bonds with his hallucinated hernia. Lisa seeks advice from an unlikely source

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The family celebrates Maggie's birthday. Bart steals Homer's wallet to pay for an Itchy and Scratchy souvenir, and Grandma Bouvier is swept off her feet by Grampa - but Mr Burns provides romantic competition, convinced she is the woman for him

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Mr Burns realises he has no heir and decides to hold auditions, intending to choose one from the children of Springfield. Unfortunately, only Bart comes close to fitting the bill

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer begins to believe Ned Flanders may not be so bad after all, and starts hanging around with him - but his friendliness and good cheer are not reciprocated for long

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart wins a competition and becomes the lucky owner of a fully grown elephant, which proceeds to eat his hard-up family out of house and home

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Carrie gets a temporary job at Doug's company, much to his dismay. Arthur tries to persuade his friends to pose for a picture to go on a Christmas card

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: The Heffernans reminisce about moving into their house 10 years previously - and recall how Carrie had a tough job convincing a reluctant Doug, who was opposed to the change

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Arthur wins $2,500 at a bingo game, but his decision to share part of his winnings with Doug and Carrie comes with its own set of rules - he will decide how they spend it. American comedy, starring Kevin James, Leah Remini and Jerry Stiller

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert encounters a beautiful woman who learns his surname is Barone and mistakenly assumes he is Raymond - a situation he is quick to turn to his romantic advantage. Brad Garrett stars

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Frank catches a football at a college game and refuses to give it back. He tries instead to auction it over the radio for $10,000 - much to the horror of Ray, who tries to make him feel guilty for being so mercenary

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Marie receives a letter in which a relative boasts about how well her children are doing, and responds by enlisting Debra's help to concoct a fictitious catalogue of her own family's achievements. Doris Roberts and Ray Romano star

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles takes dancing lessons in preparation for a posh society ball, but his date falls ill at the last minute, so he asks Daphne to go with him instead. Comedy, starring David Hyde Pierce and Jane Leeves

programme.title: Frasier
programme.sub-title: The Show Where Diane Comes Back
programme.desc: Diane visits Seattle for the opening night of her new play, which turns out to be a mixed blessing for Frasier. Although hurt over being jilted, he still harbours feelings for her - but they disappear once he attends the dress rehearsal. Shelley Long guest stars

programme.title: Frasier
programme.sub-title: A Word to the Wise Guy
programme.desc: A shady character helps the Crane brothers get Maris out of a spot of legal trouble - then demands they return the favour by persuading his girlfriend to marry him. Comedy, guest starring Harris Yulin, with Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer are joined by guests Jamie Laing, Victoria Smurfit and Bonnie Langford. With live music from James Smith

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer and Marge buy a self-help video to improve their lives - but make the mistake of enlisting Bart and Lisa's assistance. Featuring the voices of James Brown and Albert Brooks

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer teaches an adult education course on the secrets of marital bliss. However, Marge spoils it by kicking him out of the house for revealing intimate domestic details to his students

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first destination of the week is Northlands Farm in Chichester, where host Keith offers the full farm experience and an afternoon of paddleboarding on his very own lake

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Claire hosts the second visit of the week at the Mad Hatters Campsite in Ely, Cambridgeshire. Martha and Lisa love the Wonderland theme but Giovanni and Enzo are not happy with the lack of ensuite

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Lisa and Martha host the third visit of the week at The Redan Inn in Chilcompton, Somerset. The guests love the quirky interiors and breakfast goes down a treat but Giovanni and Enzo get picky about plates

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit of the week is to The Limes in Maldon, Essex. Hosts Giovanni and Enzo hope their luxurious rooms will impress their guests - and the B&Bers are certainly happy to drink in the additional extras at check-in. They spend the afternoon at nearby Radio Caroline, the famous pirate radio station on a boat in Chelmsford. Breakfast dazzles most of the guests, and Giovanni and Enzo think they're onto a winner

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Payment day sees Keith try to get to the bottom of the concerning cleanliness score that's been bugging him. Lisa and Martha are also keen to uncover why Enzo and Giovanni weren't blown away by their breakfast, before the boys turn the tables to quiz their rivals about some fussy feedback

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer head to Strathaven, Lanarkshire to help Frank and Wilma decide whether to sell their four-bedroom family home or invest in it to make it work for them. Frank is firmly on Team Love It, having raised their two children there, he is convinced they still have many happy years to come in the house, while Wilma is ready to sell now that their kids have flown the nest. Kirstie grapples with a poorly placed conservatory and a kitchen diner that struggles to fit the extend ed family in as she creates a plan to renovate while Phil is put through his paces trying to convince Frank to swap suburban life for sea views

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: A man pays homage to one of the great modernist homes with his new garden room and George visits the teenager who created a shepherd's hut last year, to follow his latest build. George visits a bizarre garden folly inspired by a wedding cake, a striking beach house inspired by pill boxes and an old RNLI station. In Denmark, the architect checks out a stunning circular house inspired by the owner's car collection

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer
programme.desc: Judges Caroline Waldegrave and Paul Hollywood, and hosts Noel Fielding and Alison Hammond, are joined in the tent by Jim Howick, Gloria Hunniford, Ellie Goldstein and Jamali Maddix. The bakers take on a retro recipe for brandy snaps in the signature, try not to be too cheesy in the technical and reveal all with a 'my best kept secret' cake showstopper

programme.title: Cruising to the Ends of the Earth
programme.desc: In Alaska, the Royal Princess docks in the small city of Ketchikan, where towering evergreens meet mist-shrouded mountains. Two of the ship's crew take part in a show celebrating the traditional skills and daring feats of North America's logging heritage. In Aomori in northern Japan, guests immerse themselves in the ritual of bathing in mountain hot springs

programme.title: Your Song
programme.desc: Alison Hammond hosts the final performance at London's Hackney Empire. Sam Ryder and Paloma Faith must choose one of the five acts as the performance of the night. Chantel's a kidney transplant survivor, Findlay sings his mother's favourite song, teenager Milo stopped singing for two years after being teased, and for Iranian refugee Mina, singing was once an act of rebellion. Finally there's Elliot: a wildcard entry with the best smile in Britain

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their thoughts on Prisoner, David Attenborough's 100 Years on Planet Earth, Countdown, First Dates, Scam Interceptors and news reports about the local elections and Keir Starmer

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Social activist Aaron is paired with youth worker and nightclub host Nathan - and while they might seem like strangers, their date leads to a twist neither of them is expecting. Former mayor Tracey meets toilet roll salesman Stuart, while barber Verity is paired with 6ft 5 Mancunian coach driver Liam. Burlesque dancer Double D, aka Deborah, is ready to steal the show, and maybe someone's heart. Her date Lee seems like the perfect match - a professional singer who is hoping to turn his solo act into a romantic duet

programme.title: Do You Know This Man?
programme.desc: The story of two women who, as teenagers in the 1990s, were groomed and sexually abused by a friend's father. Years later, as adults, the women recognised what had been done to them and reported it to police. But the case collapsed in court due to a procedural error and their abuser walked free. So Laura posted a public appeal on social media for other victims to come forward. In 2018, a third woman responded. This documentary traces three survivors' fight for justice, revealing the reality of grooming and the trauma of being disbelieved

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three restaurants he helped that were among the biggest challenges he faced, finding out whether they stayed on the road to recovery or turned back into nightmares. First he meets sisters Rita and Lisa to see if they have continued serving fresh instead of frozen food at Boston's La Galleria 33, before heading to the Olde Hitching Post in Hanson, Massachusetts, to discover whether controlling owner Tom has kept his promise and handed over the reins to his daughter Andrea. Finally, Gordon goes back to the Prohibition gastro pub in Everett, Washington, to catch up with owner Rishi and learn if she has ditched belly-dancing in favour of running her business

programme.title: How to Build a Girl (2019)
programme.desc: A 16-year-old living in Wolverhampton finds comfort in placing portraits of her media idols covering her bedroom wall. She dreams of escaping her humdrum circumstances by becoming a writer, and manages to secure a trial as a music journalist. Eager to reinvent herself, she adopts a new style, bright red hair and an outlandish pen name. In due course she realises that cruel reviews offer a pathway to success allowing her to support her family financially. Drama based on Caitlin Moran's memoir, with Beanie Feldstein, Cleo and Donal Finn

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay is in Redondo Beach, California, for the first of two visits to Zayna Flaming Grill, a Mediterranean restaurant owned and run by aunt and niece Faye and Brenda. Faye believes she has the weight of the entire restaurant on her shoulders, while Brenda feels she isn't treated as an equal in the business. With tensions rising, the food not up to scratch and everyone playing the blame game, the chef is faced with one of the trickiest situations he's ever encountered

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition begins at stately home Anstey Hall in Cambridge, with father and son team John and Johnny de Bruyne. The fun starts with a character-revealing afternoon of goose-herding, before the participants dress to impress at a formal dinner. John recounts stories of royal connections - which fails to impress hotel managers Mark and Layla. In the morning, as they tuck in to a self-service breakfast, guest Tim decides that DIY doesn't work at Anstey Hall, but when he notes this on his feedback form, John and Johnny accuse him of game-playing

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit of the competition is to clothes-free Clover Spa and Hotel in Birmingham, where owner Tim Higgs hopes to convert his rivals to the joys of naturism. Judging with an extra critical eye are John and Jonny De Bruyne, who received negative feedback from Tim, and a thorough room inspection reveals a dusty porn DVD. Tim tries to encourage his nervous guests to take part in a naked spa experience, but John opts to watch television instead. When feedback is invited, Tim is delighted to discover Mark and Layla would stay again but shocked by the 'porn film' discovery

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants travel to the Angel Hotel in Coleford, Gloucestershire for the third day of the competition, where a treasure hunt organised by hosts Mark and Layla brings out their guests' competitive sides. Meanwhile, there is confusion at breakfast and Layla's manners are criticised

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final stay is at Higher Gitcombe in Totnes, Devon, where owners Paul and Lynnie Jolly set out to spoil their guests. Everyone is overwhelmed by the added extras, but naturist Tim is put off by cushions and clutter. After a masterclass in Nordic walking, Lynnie serves up a veg smoothie, which unhealthy eaters Mark and Layla dubiously down in one. Over dinner, Tim challenges his host's organic 'niche'. And Layla, still smarting from his negative feedback, labels him 'weird, naked Tim'. At breakfast, guests are wary as Tim's order goes wrong and Jonny and Layla engage in an eating competition. When feedback is invited, the Jollys are affronted by accusations of special treatment and vow to put the record straight

programme.title: The Last Duel (2021)
programme.desc: In medieval France, squire Jacques Le Gris secures a captaincy destined for knight Jean de Carrouges. To rub salt into fresh wounds, Jacques' promotion includes land intended for his rival. Jean canters off to war and returns to his wife Marguerite, who claims she was sexually assaulted by Jacques. Ridley Scott's epic drama based on a book by Eric Jager, starring Adam Driver, Jodie Comer, and Matt Damon and Ben Affleck (who also worked on the screenplay)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Rosaria bought Bella Luna to realise her son Gianfranco's ambition to become a chef, but the Italian restaurant's future looks bleak due to his lack of experience in the kitchen combined with her refusal to acknowledge the eatery's many flaws. programme.title: Your Song
programme.desc: Sam Ryder and Paloma Faith take the chosen singers into the studio to rehearse for the final concert. But first, they decide to include a fifth singer. Who should they bring back? As the practice sessions begin, Milo must learn to be bigger on stage, Chantel battles with self-doubt, Findlay rehearses his mum's funeral song a year after her death and Mina starts losing her voice the day before the concert. Alison Hammond follows their progress

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When a romantic night ends in injury, Marge recovers by taking up kite boarding, while Homer bonds with his hallucinated hernia. Lisa seeks advice from an unlikely source

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The family celebrates Maggie's birthday. Bart steals Homer's wallet to pay for an Itchy and Scratchy souvenir, and Grandma Bouvier is swept off her feet by Grampa - but Mr Burns provides romantic competition, convinced she is the woman for him

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Mr Burns realises he has no heir and decides to hold auditions, intending to choose one from the children of Springfield. Unfortunately, only Bart comes close to fitting the bill

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer begins to believe Ned Flanders may not be so bad after all, and starts hanging around with him - but his friendliness and good cheer are not reciprocated for long

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart wins a competition and becomes the lucky owner of a fully grown elephant, which proceeds to eat his hard-up family out of house and home

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Carrie gets a temporary job at Doug's company, much to his dismay. Arthur tries to persuade his friends to pose for a picture to go on a Christmas card

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: The Heffernans reminisce about moving into their house 10 years previously - and recall how Carrie had a tough job convincing a reluctant Doug, who was opposed to the change

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Arthur wins $2,500 at a bingo game, but his decision to share part of his winnings with Doug and Carrie comes with its own set of rules - he will decide how they spend it. American comedy, starring Kevin James, Leah Remini and Jerry Stiller

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert encounters a beautiful woman who learns his surname is Barone and mistakenly assumes he is Raymond - a situation he is quick to turn to his romantic advantage. Brad Garrett stars

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Frank catches a football at a college game and refuses to give it back. He tries instead to auction it over the radio for $10,000 - much to the horror of Ray, who tries to make him feel guilty for being so mercenary

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Marie receives a letter in which a relative boasts about how well her children are doing, and responds by enlisting Debra's help to concoct a fictitious catalogue of her own family's achievements. Doris Roberts and Ray Romano star

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles takes dancing lessons in preparation for a posh society ball, but his date falls ill at the last minute, so he asks Daphne to go with him instead. Comedy, starring David Hyde Pierce and Jane Leeves

programme.title: Frasier
programme.sub-title: The Show Where Diane Comes Back
programme.desc: Diane visits Seattle for the opening night of her new play, which turns out to be a mixed blessing for Frasier. Although hurt over being jilted, he still harbours feelings for her - but they disappear once he attends the dress rehearsal. Shelley Long guest stars

programme.title: Frasier
programme.sub-title: A Word to the Wise Guy
programme.desc: A shady character helps the Crane brothers get Maris out of a spot of legal trouble - then demands they return the favour by persuading his girlfriend to marry him. Comedy, guest starring Harris Yulin, with Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer are joined by guests Jamie Laing, Victoria Smurfit and Bonnie Langford. With live music from James Smith

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer and Marge buy a self-help video to improve their lives - but make the mistake of enlisting Bart and Lisa's assistance. Featuring the voices of James Brown and Albert Brooks

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer teaches an adult education course on the secrets of marital bliss. However, Marge spoils it by kicking him out of the house for revealing intimate domestic details to his students

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first destination of the week is Northlands Farm in Chichester, where host Keith offers the full farm experience and an afternoon of paddleboarding on his very own lake

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Claire hosts the second visit of the week at the Mad Hatters Campsite in Ely, Cambridgeshire. Martha and Lisa love the Wonderland theme but Giovanni and Enzo are not happy with the lack of ensuite

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Lisa and Martha host the third visit of the week at The Redan Inn in Chilcompton, Somerset. The guests love the quirky interiors and breakfast goes down a treat but Giovanni and Enzo get picky about plates

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit of the week is to The Limes in Maldon, Essex. Hosts Giovanni and Enzo hope their luxurious rooms will impress their guests - and the B&Bers are certainly happy to drink in the additional extras at check-in. They spend the afternoon at nearby Radio Caroline, the famous pirate radio station on a boat in Chelmsford. Breakfast dazzles most of the guests, and Giovanni and Enzo think they're onto a winner

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Payment day sees Keith try to get to the bottom of the concerning cleanliness score that's been bugging him. Lisa and Martha are also keen to uncover why Enzo and Giovanni weren't blown away by their breakfast, before the boys turn the tables to quiz their rivals about some fussy feedback

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer head to Strathaven, Lanarkshire to help Frank and Wilma decide whether to sell their four-bedroom family home or invest in it to make it work for them. Frank is firmly on Team Love It, having raised their two children there, he is convinced they still have many happy years to come in the house, while Wilma is ready to sell now that their kids have flown the nest. Kirstie grapples with a poorly placed conservatory and a kitchen diner that struggles to fit the extend ed family in as she creates a plan to renovate while Phil is put through his paces trying to convince Frank to swap suburban life for sea views

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: A man pays homage to one of the great modernist homes with his new garden room and George visits the teenager who created a shepherd's hut last year, to follow his latest build. George visits a bizarre garden folly inspired by a wedding cake, a striking beach house inspired by pill boxes and an old RNLI station. In Denmark, the architect checks out a stunning circular house inspired by the owner's car collection

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer
programme.desc: Judges Caroline Waldegrave and Paul Hollywood, and hosts Noel Fielding and Alison Hammond, are joined in the tent by Jim Howick, Gloria Hunniford, Ellie Goldstein and Jamali Maddix. The bakers take on a retro recipe for brandy snaps in the signature, try not to be too cheesy in the technical and reveal all with a 'my best kept secret' cake showstopper

programme.title: Cruising to the Ends of the Earth
programme.desc: In Alaska, the Royal Princess docks in the small city of Ketchikan, where towering evergreens meet mist-shrouded mountains. Two of the ship's crew take part in a show celebrating the traditional skills and daring feats of North America's logging heritage. In Aomori in northern Japan, guests immerse themselves in the ritual of bathing in mountain hot springs

programme.title: Your Song
programme.desc: Alison Hammond hosts the final performance at London's Hackney Empire. Sam Ryder and Paloma Faith must choose one of the five acts as the performance of the night. Chantel's a kidney transplant survivor, Findlay sings his mother's favourite song, teenager Milo stopped singing for two years after being teased, and for Iranian refugee Mina, singing was once an act of rebellion. Finally there's Elliot: a wildcard entry with the best smile in Britain

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their thoughts on Prisoner, David Attenborough's 100 Years on Planet Earth, Countdown, First Dates, Scam Interceptors and news reports about the local elections and Keir Starmer

programme.title: Glass (2019)
programme.desc: An invulnerable vigilante battles a murderer with multiple personalities - only for both to be apprehended and transferred to a psychiatric hospital. They find themselves under the care of a sinister doctor who has plans concerning their unique abilities, but also sharing the facility with a third patient, a criminal mastermind the crime fighter had encountered before, and who is soon manipulating everyone to his own ends. M Night Shyamalan's fantasy thriller, crossing over the characters from his earlier films Unbreakable and Split. Starring James McAvoy, Bruce Willis and Samuel L Jackson

programme.title: Love Cheats
programme.desc: The case of a woman who claimed to have MS and conned her partner into running up huge debts to fund treatment, before falsely accusing him of domestic violence. When she threatened to kill herself in Japan, unless friends raise $20,000 that she claimed had been stolen, people started to question the truth of her stories and the FBI became involved

programme.title: Do You Know This Man?
programme.desc: The story of two women who, as teenagers in the 1990s, were groomed and sexually abused by a friend's father. Years later, as adults, the women recognised what had been done to them and reported it to police. But the case collapsed in court due to a procedural error and their abuser walked free. So Laura posted a public appeal on social media for other victims to come forward. In 2018, a third woman responded. This documentary traces three survivors' fight for justice, revealing the reality of grooming and the trauma of being disbelieved

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three restaurants he helped that were among the biggest challenges he faced, finding out whether they stayed on the road to recovery or turned back into nightmares. First he meets sisters Rita and Lisa to see if they have continued serving fresh instead of frozen food at Boston's La Galleria 33, before heading to the Olde Hitching Post in Hanson, Massachusetts, to discover whether controlling owner Tom has kept his promise and handed over the reins to his daughter Andrea. Finally, Gordon goes back to the Prohibition gastro pub in Everett, Washington, to catch up with owner Rishi and learn if she has ditched belly-dancing in favour of running her business

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Krusty nearly kills Homer after a bad TV review and hides out in a circus, but soon finds himself the centre of attention

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer and Marge buy a self-help video to improve their lives - but make the mistake of enlisting Bart and Lisa's assistance. Featuring the voices of James Brown and Albert Brooks

programme.desc: Ross discovers who mugged him as a child and Chandler's internship gets off to an uninspiring start. Meanwhile, Joey endures a draining audition at the hands of a self-important actor. Guest starring Jeff Goldblum and Tenacious D's Kyle Gass

programme.sub-title: The One with the Boob Job
programme.desc: Cash-strapped couple Chandler and Monica conceal from each other that they have asked Joey for money. programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Memorial Service
programme.desc: A joke entry on Ross's college website backfires on Chandler. Joey refuses to give Emma his favourite stuffed toy, and weak-willed Phoebe begs Monica to help her avoid contacting Mike. Comedy, starring Matthew Perry and Matt LeBlanc

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Everyone except Ross pools their money to buy lottery tickets, but a disagreement about how to spend any winnings prompts a disdainful Phoebe to make a rash gesture. Chandler frets as he waits for a phone call that could mean a new job, and Rachel thinks Emma is close to saying her first word

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel joins Joey on the set of his soap opera, where a steamy love scene inspires unexpected feelings - and a disturbing dream. Phoebe takes an opportunity to serenade a captive audience, while Chandler plans to whisk Monica away - but ends up inviting Ross. Jennifer Aniston and Matt LeBlanc star

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Soap Opera Party

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Fertility Test
programme.desc: Chandler and Monica go to a fertility clinic for tests, but are embarrassed to encounter an old acquaintance. Ross helps Joey pretend to be intelligent to woo Charlie, even though he is attracted to her himself, and Rachel sneaks into a spa for a massage

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica and Chandler conduct an embarrassing interview with a potential sperm donor after learning they cannot conceive a baby naturally. Rachel reveals she still has feelings for Joey, but his current girlfriend overhears her confession, and Phoebe bumps into her old boyfriend David. Comedy, guest starring John Stamos and Hank Azaria

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Double bill. The gang visits Barbados to hear Ross address a convention, but Chandler manages to destroy the only copy of his keynote speech. Joey and Rachel impersonate pharmacists to infiltrate a medical conference offering free drinks, while Mike arrives unexpectedly and proposes to Phoebe

programme.title: Dr Dolittle (1998)
programme.desc: A doctor is stunned to discover he can talk to animals, and it is not long before his home and surgery are taken over by an assortment of ailing creatures in need of help. However, when the medic's odd behaviour attracts his colleagues' attention, he is forced to rely on his new-found furry friends to save him from the asylum. Comedy, starring Eddie Murphy, Ossie Davis and Oliver Platt

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One After Joey and Rachel Kiss
programme.desc: Rachel and Joey struggle to find the words to tell Ross about their kiss in Barbados, while Phoebe makes the alarming discovery that Mike has a girlfriend. Starring Jennifer Aniston, Matt LeBlanc and Lisa Kudrow

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Ross Is Fine
programme.desc: Ross tries to put on a brave face and invites Joey and Rachel to dinner with him and Charlie, but gets drunk and makes an embarrassing scene. Frank Jr tries to talk Phoebe into taking care of one of the triplets, while Chandler and Monica learn more about adoption

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross goes to a spray-tanning salon, but his failure to follow the instructions leaves him with a complexion he was not looking for. Joey and Rachel prepare to sleep together for the first time, but the night proves more awkward than romantic. Guest starring Jennifer Coolidge

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica and Chandler decide to delay their trip to Vermont to celebrate Emma's first birthday, but the party takes an unexpected turn with the delivery of a risque birthday cake. Comedy, guest starring Elliott Gould

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Rachel's Sister Babysits
programme.desc: Christina Applegate reprises her role as Rachel's clueless sister Amy, who offers to babysit Emma and ends up giving the unfortunate child a makeover. Phoebe inadvertently spoils Mike's anniversary surprise, and Joey writes a letter of recommendation for the Bings. Comedy, guest starring Christina Applegate and Paul Rudd

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Greg Kinnear guest stars as Charlie's Nobel Prize-winning old flame, who is overseeing a grant Ross desperately wants. Rachel and Monica try to foist on each other one of Phoebe's peculiar paintings. Comedy, guest starring Aisha Tyler (Archer) and Greg Kinnear (I Don't Know How She Does It)

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Home Study
programme.desc: Ross discovers Rachel has an irrational fear of swings, while Phoebe and Mike argue about whether to give their wedding fund to charity. The Bings learn Joey had a one-night stand with the adoption worker handling their case, and worry he has ruined their chances

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebe's big day arrives, but wedding planner Monica and stand-in father of the bride Joey take their roles a little too seriously. To make matters worse, a blizzard hits New York and one of Mike's ushers is indisposed, forcing Ross and Chandler to step into the breach

programme.title: Michael McIntyre's The Wheel
programme.desc: The comedian hosts the game show in which contestants take on a colossal spinning wheel and answer questions in the hope of securing a cash prize. programme.title: Dude, Where's My Car? (2000)
programme.desc: Two friends wake up with the realisation they have absolutely no memory of the events of the night before. They set about retracing their steps - only to stumble across a host of crazy characters, a flock of marauding ostriches and a fanatical alien-worshipping cult. Comedy, starring Seann William Scott, Ashton Kutcher, Jennifer Garner and Kristy Swanson

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Birth Mother
programme.desc: Monica and Chandler travel to Ohio to meet the mother of the baby they plan to adopt. The pregnant mother, Erica, likes them but only because their files got mixed up with a doctor and a female minister. Meanwhile, Joey is set up on a date with one of Phoebe's friends, but soon regrets it when she tries to take some food off his plate, and Ross has a fashion faux pas when he accidently wears women's clothing on a date

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Chandler Gets Caught
programme.desc: Rachel and Phoebe see Chandler getting into a car with a mystery woman and follow them to a large house in the suburbs. They tell Monica of their fears and are shocked to hear the truth. Comedy, starring Jennifer Aniston, Lisa Kudrow and Matthew Perry

programme.sub-title: The One Where the Stripper Cries
programme.desc: Joey appears on quiz show The $100,000 Pyramid, but his disastrous efforts to answer the questions end up costing his partner the prize money. Meanwhile, the revellers at Phoebe's hen party get a surprise once the stripper shows up. Guest starring Danny DeVito and Donny Osmond

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Joey Speaks French
programme.desc: Joey persuades Phoebe to teach him French for an important audition, while Monica and Chandler show a pregnant Erica the sights of New York and learn more about the baby's possible father. Guest starring Anna Faris and Ron Leibman

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel heads to a restaurant for a job interview, only to find herself sitting at a table within earshot of her current boss. Meanwhile, Monica and Chandler go house-hunting and Phoebe decides to change her name. Guest starring Paul Rudd and Dakota Fanning

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebe learns Joey's agent has died, but he is so upset about his friends moving away that she decides not to tell him. programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Rachel's Going Away Party
programme.desc: The gang throws a going-away party for Rachel, but she prefers to say her goodbyes individually - and one of her friends is left feeling hurt at being overlooked. Meanwhile, Monica supervises the packing for a new life in the suburbs with Chandler, while also keeping a close eye on the mother of their future adopted child

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The Last One (Parts One and Two)
programme.desc: Double bill. The last-ever episode of the comedy sees the pals facing major changes. There is a surprise in store for Monica and Chandler when Erica finally gives birth to the child they are planning to adopt, Phoebe and Mike decide to start a family of their own and Rachel gets set to begin a new life in Paris. Jennifer Aniston, Courteney Cox, Lisa Kudrow, Matt LeBlanc, Matthew Perry and David Schwimmer star

programme.title: Dr Dolittle 2 (2001)
programme.desc: The vet with a talent for talking to animals comes to the aid of forest creatures that need his help protecting their homes from land developers. Comedy sequel, starring Eddie Murphy and Kevin Pollak, with the voices of Steve Zahn, Lisa Kudrow and Isaac Hayes

Chandler and Joey encourage Ross to enjoy bachelorhood when his lesbian wife walks out on him, while Phoebe supports herself playing guitar in the subway. Courteney Cox, Jennifer Aniston, David Schwimmer, Matthew Perry and Lisa Kudrow star

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Sonogram at the End
programme.desc: Carol tells Ross she plans to raise his child with her lover Susan, but he can be involved if he wants. Ross and Monica's parents announce they are coming to dinner, while Rachel is aghast to discover her former fiance went on what would have been their honeymoon with her maid of honour

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica shows off her new boyfriend to the rest of the group, Chandler decides to take up smoking again and Phoebe makes a gruesome discovery that leads to her receiving a windfall. Starring Courteney Cox, Matthew Perry and Lisa Kudrow

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The girls end up breaking out binoculars in order to catch a glimpse of a good-looking neighbour with White House connections after accidentally receiving a pizza that he ordered, while Joey and Chandler take Ross to a ice hockey game to keep his mind busy

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the East German Laundry Detergent
programme.desc: Ross joins Rachel on her first trip to a launderette, where a machine shortage leads to a tense stand-off. Phoebe and Chandler make a pact to break up with their partners, and Joey tricks a former girlfriend into believing Monica is the new woman in his life

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Chandler begins a relationship with a married woman, Ross tries to liven up his conservative image and Joey lands a film role with a difference - as a naked body-double for Al Pacino

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: A power cut exposes Chandler to temptation by trapping him in a bank's ATM lobby with only a stunning model for company. Ross has a hard time trying to ask Rachel out on a date, and Joey learns something interesting about Monica

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Nana Dies Twice

programme.title: See No Evil, Hear No Evil (1989)
programme.desc: A blind man and his deaf friend go on the run to clear themselves of a trumped-up murder charge. Comedy, starring Richard Pryor, Gene Wilder, Kevin Spacey, Joan Severance, Alan North and Anthony Zerbe

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebe's big day arrives, but wedding planner Monica and stand-in father of the bride Joey take their roles a little too seriously. To make matters worse, a blizzard hits New York and one of Mike's ushers is indisposed, forcing Ross and Chandler to step into the breach

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Joey Speaks French
programme.desc: Joey persuades Phoebe to teach him French for an important audition, while Monica and Chandler show a pregnant Erica the sights of New York and learn more about the baby's possible father. Guest starring Anna Faris and Ron Leibman

programme.title: Bradley & Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: The actor and his son Barney arrive in Texas, where they enjoy driving around in tanks, experience space travel in a centrifuge and hear campfire tales about UFOs. First up, the pair undertake some centrifuge training, which is used to prepare astronauts for the crushing gravitational forces produced at take-off from the extreme exhilaration. They also head to the outskirts of Houston to meet some UFO enthusiasts who investigate claimed sightings of extra-terrestrials, and are gripped by stories of spaceships blocking roads and people being taken by aliens for experiments

programme.title: Bradley & Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: The actor and his son Barney embark on the final leg of their journey, which sees the pair arrive in the Louisiana city of New Orleans. Here, they visit a spiritual voodoo priest for a spot of energy cleansing, and feed alligators in the Bayou with Captain Billy, who knows every corner of the wetlands, having been born and raised on the bayous of South Louisiana. Later, Bradley hops on board the Natchez jazz Steamboat, before the pair take to the streets to lead a spectacular parade with a six-piece band

programme.desc: Ally babysits the twins, and does such a good job that Debra gives her even more responsibility around the house. However, Marie fears her granddaughter is being treated like a slave

programme.title: Michael McIntyre's Big Show
programme.desc: The lively comedian hosts another Saturday night revue at London's Theatre Royal on Drury Lane. An audience member approaching her 80th birthday receives the shock of her life when she plays Soap or Nope, and Pointless host Alexander Armstrong risks handing over his phone to Michael in Celebrity Send to All. programme.title: Bradley & Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: The pair continue their European adventure in Poland, going sightseeing in Krakow before attending an exclusive performance by the Polish National Radio Symphony Orchestra in honour of Poland's most famous composer Chopin

programme.title: Bradley & Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: The actor and his son head to Denmark, where a meeting with some Vikings gives them a great introduction to this famous country before things take a lighter turn as the pair meet a laughter guru. Bradley's fear of heights is pushed to the limit with a visit to the top of an offshore wind turbine with breathtaking views across Copenhagen

programme.title: Bradley & Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: The actor and his son head to Sweden, where they go head-to-head in a curling competition alongside the country's women's team in Stockholm. The next day, Barney treats his dad to an infamous fishy delicacy for breakfast, then takes him paintballing with a Western twist, and finally lines up a musical surprise for Abba fan Bradley

programme.title: Bradley & Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: The actor and his son conclude their latest trip by heading to Norway, where Barney has arranged to meet a local adventurer, who dares them to sit in icy water before showing them a spectacular stunt by diving from 20 metres head-first into a lake. They then go to Lillehammer home to sample the bobsleigh run used in the 1994 Winter Olympics, before going into the Arctic Circle to try out one of the world's most northerly surfing spots

programme.title: Bradley & Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.sub-title: Bradley & Barney: Breaking Dad at Christmas
programme.desc: The actor and his son hit the road together on a series of adventures

programme.title: Bradley & Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: The actor and his 20-year-old son Barney hit the road together, travelling more than 2,000 miles from Los Angeles to New Orleans. The pair begin their journey in Los Angeles, and head down to Muscle Beach to lift weights, before taking part in a game of volleyball. The following day, Bradley is terrified to hear that the agenda involves a 14,000ft skydive

programme.title: Bradley & Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: Actor Bradley Walsh and his 20-year-old son Barney hit the road together, travelling more than 2,000 miles from Los Angeles to New Orleans. In the second leg of their journey, the pair leave the city of Los Angeles behind and make their way down the famous Route 66 to the southwestern state of Arizona. Here, they ride through a deserted ghost town, before the father and son reach Lake Havasu City, where Barney has arranged for them to try jet-skiing. Finally, they attend a Cowboy College, where they learn to become real-life horsemen

programme.desc: Rachel joins Joey on the set of his soap opera, where a steamy love scene inspires unexpected feelings - and a disturbing dream. Phoebe takes an opportunity to serenade a captive audience, while Chandler plans to whisk Monica away - but ends up inviting Ross. Jennifer Aniston and Matt LeBlanc star

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Soap Opera Party
programme.desc: Joey throws a party for the cast of Days of Our Lives, but refuses to invite his pals in case their behaviour embarrasses him. However, the answering machine gives the game away and everyone attends - which is good news for Ross

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Fertility Test
programme.desc: Chandler and Monica go to a fertility clinic for tests, but are embarrassed to encounter an old acquaintance. Ross helps Joey pretend to be intelligent to woo Charlie, even though he is attracted to her himself, and Rachel sneaks into a spa for a massage

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica and Chandler conduct an embarrassing interview with a potential sperm donor after learning they cannot conceive a baby naturally. Rachel reveals she still has feelings for Joey, but his current girlfriend overhears her confession, and Phoebe bumps into her old boyfriend David. Comedy, guest starring John Stamos and Hank Azaria

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Double bill. The gang visits Barbados to hear Ross address a convention, but Chandler manages to destroy the only copy of his keynote speech. Joey and Rachel impersonate pharmacists to infiltrate a medical conference offering free drinks, while Mike arrives unexpectedly and proposes to Phoebe

programme.title: Dr Dolittle (1998)
programme.desc: A doctor is stunned to discover he can talk to animals, and it is not long before his home and surgery are taken over by an assortment of ailing creatures in need of help. However, when the medic's odd behaviour attracts his colleagues' attention, he is forced to rely on his new-found furry friends to save him from the asylum. Comedy, starring Eddie Murphy, Ossie Davis and Oliver Platt

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One After Joey and Rachel Kiss
programme.desc: Rachel and Joey struggle to find the words to tell Ross about their kiss in Barbados, while Phoebe makes the alarming discovery that Mike has a girlfriend. Starring Jennifer Aniston, Matt LeBlanc and Lisa Kudrow

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Ross Is Fine
programme.desc: Ross tries to put on a brave face and invites Joey and Rachel to dinner with him and Charlie, but gets drunk and makes an embarrassing scene. Frank Jr tries to talk Phoebe into taking care of one of the triplets, while Chandler and Monica learn more about adoption

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross goes to a spray-tanning salon, but his failure to follow the instructions leaves him with a complexion he was not looking for. Joey and Rachel prepare to sleep together for the first time, but the night proves more awkward than romantic. Guest starring Jennifer Coolidge

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica and Chandler decide to delay their trip to Vermont to celebrate Emma's first birthday, but the party takes an unexpected turn with the delivery of a risque birthday cake. Comedy, guest starring Elliott Gould

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Rachel's Sister Babysits
programme.desc: Christina Applegate reprises her role as Rachel's clueless sister Amy, who offers to babysit Emma and ends up giving the unfortunate child a makeover. Phoebe inadvertently spoils Mike's anniversary surprise, and Joey writes a letter of recommendation for the Bings. Comedy, guest starring Christina Applegate and Paul Rudd

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Greg Kinnear guest stars as Charlie's Nobel Prize-winning old flame, who is overseeing a grant Ross desperately wants. Rachel and Monica try to foist on each other one of Phoebe's peculiar paintings. Comedy, guest starring Aisha Tyler (Archer) and Greg Kinnear (I Don't Know How She Does It)

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Home Study
programme.desc: Ross discovers Rachel has an irrational fear of swings, while Phoebe and Mike argue about whether to give their wedding fund to charity. The Bings learn Joey had a one-night stand with the adoption worker handling their case, and worry he has ruined their chances

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebe's big day arrives, but wedding planner Monica and stand-in father of the bride Joey take their roles a little too seriously. To make matters worse, a blizzard hits New York and one of Mike's ushers is indisposed, forcing Ross and Chandler to step into the breach

programme.sub-title: The One Where Joey Speaks French

programme.desc: Rachel heads to a restaurant for a job interview, only to find herself sitting at a table within earshot of her current boss. Meanwhile, Monica and Chandler go house-hunting and Phoebe decides to change her name. Guest starring Paul Rudd and Dakota Fanning

programme.desc: Phoebe learns Joey's agent has died, but he is so upset about his friends moving away that she decides not to tell him. programme.sub-title: The One with Rachel's Going Away Party

Meanwhile, Monica supervises the packing for a new life in the suburbs with Chandler, while also keeping a close eye on the mother of their future adopted child

Jennifer Aniston, Courteney Cox, Lisa Kudrow, Matt LeBlanc, Matthew Perry and David Schwimmer star

programme.desc: The girls end up breaking out binoculars in order to catch a glimpse of a good-looking neighbour with White House connections after accidentally receiving a pizza that he ordered, while Joey and Chandler take Ross to a ice hockey game to keep his mind busy

programme.desc: Chandler begins a relationship with a married woman, Ross tries to liven up his conservative image and Joey lands a film role with a difference - as a naked body-double for Al Pacino

programme.desc: A power cut exposes Chandler to temptation by trapping him in a bank's ATM lobby with only a stunning model for company. Ross has a hard time trying to ask Rachel out on a date, and Joey learns something interesting about Monica

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain
programme.desc: In May 2012, six children aged between five and 13 died at the hands of their parents Mick and Mairead Philpott in a house fire in Derby. The blaze was started as an attempt to frame the former mistress of father-of-17 Mick, and despite tearful appearances in front of the TV cameras, the couple were convicted of manslaughter months later. This documentary features interviews with eyewitnesses and neighbours who tried to save the children

She fell in love with her saviour, but the disaster on the horizon meant their time together was doomed to be short. programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: Part one. The experiment is over, and the couples reunite for one last meeting, with one bride furious that her groom has been texting one of the other women

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: Part one. The experiment is over, and the couples reunite for one last meeting, with one bride furious that her groom has been texting one of the other women

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: Revenge Is a Dish Best Served Three Times
programme.desc: Three stories of vengeance, featuring Homer being accused of treason in post-revolutionary France, Milhouse leading a rebellion of misfits in modern-day Springfield and a new crimefighter by the name of Red Revenge takes to the streets of Springfield

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart is awarded a driving licence for saving Springfield from a fire, and finds himself tied down when he develops a serious relationship with a teenage girl in a nearby town. Meanwhile, Lisa lands herself in trouble by falsely claiming Native American heritage. With the voice of Natalie Portman

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer decides to skip church so he can enjoy himself watching TV, making waffles and dancing semi-naked in the guise of Tom Cruise. When he subsequently experiences a vision from God, the lazy father is inspired to start his own religion. Animated comedy, with the voice of Dan Castellaneta

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer enters Lisa in a beauty pageant to boost her self-esteem, and has the satisfaction of seeing her crowned runner-up - but she finds her principles heavily compromised as a result. Featuring the voice of Bob Hope

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Trilogy of spooky stories. A murderous Krusty doll terrorises Homer, Mr Burns travels to a remote island to capture a giant ape and Bart's attempt to resurrect the family's dead cat Snowball goes disastrously wrong

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Guilt-stricken at having spent all the family's Christmas money on himself, Homer resolves to turn over a new leaf and become a do-gooder - but his kindness soon starts to rival that of Ned Flanders, and the neighbours embark on a battle for supremacy

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: Marge v Singles, Seniors, Childless Couples and Teens, and Gays
programme.desc: A baby riot breaks out at a children's concert in Springfield, so the town's childless community forms an anti-youth lobby. The initiative threatens to eliminate all child-friendly aspects of the area, until Marge decides to fight back with a cunning plan of her own

programme.title: The Amazing Race Australia
programme.desc: On Borneo, the final four teams get hands-on gutting fish at a bustling market and dive headfirst into a conservation mission. However, saving the planet takes a toll on the would-be eco warriors

programme.title: I, Robot (2004)
programme.desc: The inventor of an advanced form of intelligent robot is found dead, and the detective investigating the case is certain that one of the scientist's mechanical creations is responsible - but no one believes his theory because the robots have been programmed to prevent them from harming humans. Sci-fi thriller, inspired by the Isaac Asimov stories, starring Will Smith, Bridget Moynahan and Alan Tudyk

programme.title: White House Down (2013)
programme.desc: A policeman is turned down for his dream job as a secret service bodyguard to the president. While taking his daughter on a tour of the White House, he gets the chance to prove himself when terrorists seize control of the building, putting the head of state's life in his hands. Action thriller, starring Channing Tatum, Jamie Foxx, Maggie Gyllenhaal and James Woods

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: A look back at the times when what started as great chemistry in the studio ended in dating disaster, reliving memorable arguments and cringeworthy moments, including bisexual Leah from the third series, who brought her pet dog Kush to the studio to help her pick her partner. There is also a reunion between Cathy from Hertfordshire and her date Andy

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Forty-two-year-old logistics manager Luke from Chichester is back in the UK after seven years working in the Middle East and is looking for a woman to reinvigorate his love life. Thirty-five-year-old amateur pole dancer Abi from Colchester is looking for fun times with someone silly who can send her heart into a spin

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Highlights of the year's episodes, featuring memorable appearances by the Siddiquis, Giles and Mary, Jenny and Lee, Ellie and Izzi, Marcus and Mica, and Amira and Iqra as they share their opinions and lively discussions based on the best and worst TV of 2021. The shows featured include I Can See Your Voice, Mastermind, Nadiya, Ready to Mingle, Line of Duty, The Mating Game, Petrol News, Sex Actually with Alice Levine, Strictly Come Dancing, Squid Game, An Audience with Adele, Headspace Guide to Sleep, Vigil, Life Drawing Live, Sex, Love & Goop, and Coronation Street

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the irreverent panel show, with team captains Sean Lock and Jon Richardson joined by Richard Hammond, Carol Vorderman, Paul Foot and Matt Forde to see who best understands what is going on in Britain

programme.title: Taskmaster Bleeped
programme.desc: Joanne McNally, John Robins, Nick Mohammed, Sophie Willan and Steve Pemberton kick off their crusade with tasks involving roller blinds, a floating primate and, as is traditional, eggs

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy panel show's version of the popular quiz, with Sean Lock and Jason Manford going up against guest captain Sarah Millican and Jonathan Ross. programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Swansea, married couple Leanne and Senol start things off with a feast of Turkish food, which hits the spot for fun-loving Paul and his partner Verity, though Paul's love of Hawaiian shirts doesn't go down well with Catrin and Josh, who don't like the hosts' meaty main course either. On day two Catrin and Josh attempt some Welsh fine dining, but the complicated dessert fails to live up to its billing. Finally, Paul and Verity get a turn to impress with their version of good pub grub

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The first hosts in Stoke, Robbie Williams superfan Trish and her husband Dave, go all out for a good old knees up. On day two, quirky young lovebirds Patrick and Lizzie host their first ever dinner party with an 'eclectic' menu. They gamble on some wartime food and beginner's luck, and things get emotional when there's praise at the table. Finally, seasoned hosts John and Lynne have a more traditional dinner party vibe on their night

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: A couple who have been engaged for seven years seek help in securing the funds necessary for them to tie the knot. They are given £12,000, on the condition that groom-to-be Sean is left to organise the wedding alone, but his scatter-brained attitude to planning raises concerns that members of his family might have to lend a hand at the last minute

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: A music-loving groom-to-be is given £12,000 to plan every detail of his nuptials alone, but struggles to remember it is a wedding he is organising, not a concert, and battles his own ego to ensure his fiancee gets the day of her dreams

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Childhood sweethearts Emma and Patrick have two children together, but Emma has been waiting nearly 10 years to get married. The groom-to-be is given £12,000 to plan every detail of their nuptials, while she relinquishes all control of the big day in the presence of a lawyer

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom-to-be Ryan is given £12,000 to organise a spectacular Hollywood-style wedding guaranteed to impress his fiancee Fern, and sets off to Europe with his best man for a stag party to remember

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Demanding 18-year-old Hannah hopes her 28-year-old groom Andy will be able to put together the perfect Disney-style fairy-tale wedding. However, her prospective husband's plans for a Polish stag party threaten to ruin the arrangements for the big day

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Travis Boersma, co-founder and president of one of the largest privately owned drive-through coffee shop chains in America, goes undercover to learn whether the culture he and his brother hoped to implement is being upheld by the company's front-line employees

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Eric Casaburi, a former undercover boss, invites six other employers who also appeared incognito on the show to talk about their experiences of the programme at a restaurant. However, little do they realise that Eric is going to try to fool them by appearing as a waiter. Featuring Kat Cole, Paul Damico, Andy Wiederhorn, Sheldon Yellen, Anthony Wedo and Jane Grote Abell

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Yanni's in Seattle, where he clashes with defiant owner Peter Avgoustiou, a chef so set in his ways that he hasn't allowed any changes to his menu since the Greek restaurant opened in 1984. Peter's family is concerned the business is becoming trapped in the past, and standards are slipping, but he seems determined to stick to his guns

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to the Prohibition Grille in Everett, Washington, where he meets belly dancer-turned-restaurateur Rishi Brown, who is making all the wrong moves with her business. Distracted from the task of improving her menu by performing for customers, she's oblivious to the disastrous dishes being served from her own kitchen

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Nashville, Tennessee, the spiritual home of country music, but his visit begins on a sour note at Chappy's Cajun restaurant. Chef John Chapman's careless methods have damaged his reputation, but he blames the local clientele rather than his less-than-appetising food and disturbing kitchen practices. Can Gordon get through to this stubborn owner and save the eatery from disaster?

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Scottsdale, Arizona, where he meets husband-and-wife bistro owners Samy and Amy Bouzaglo, who reveal a shocking contempt for customer feedback. The chef faces the biggest challenge of the series to save Amy's Baking Company, but can he get through to this defiant pair?

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA

The chef faced the biggest challenge of the series to save Amy's Baking Company - and a media furore unfolded after the episode was broadcast

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown

programme.title: Bill Bailey's Remarkable Guide to the Orchestra
programme.desc: The comedian joins forces with Oscar-winning composer Anne Dudley to investigate some of the finer nuances of orchestral performance. He teams up with the BBC Concert Orchestra to reveal the lesser-known influences of some of the world's most celebrated composers, and exhibits some of his own original works

programme.title: Derry Girls
programme.desc: Ma Mary and Aunt Sarah are determined to put on a good show as they prepare for the highly anticipated class of 1977 school reunion. It seems like only yesterday that their own gang were beyond excited about the leavers' party. But will the truth come out about what really happened on that fateful night 20 years ago?

programme.title: Derry Girls
programme.desc: There is no bigger night in Derry than Halloween, and the gang have miraculously secured tickets to the gig of the century and the chance to meet their idol, Fatboy Slim. But when Da Gerry arrives unannounced, it becomes clear that life will never be the same again for the friends

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats

Irreverent panel show, hosted by Jimmy Carr

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Twenty five-year-old groom Colin hopes his efforts to organise a Willy Wonka-themed wedding will please his 24-year-old bride-to-be Sally. However, preparing the ceremony while holding two jobs proves a massive task, and his penchant for playing pranks threatens to turn his big day into a children's birthday party

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom-to-be Ian returns from the Merchant Navy and receives £12,000 to fund his wedding. However, he must plan a big day that will adhere to the traditions of his bride Reanna's Greek Cypriot family

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Tom from Bristol is given £12,000 to organise a dream wedding for his fiancee Lotty, who was unable to celebrate her 18th and 21st birthdays after her mother died of cervical cancer

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Shane Evans, COO and co-founder of massage therapy chain Massage Heights, poses as a contestant on a TV reality show who is trying fund her own business. After spending nine years moulding the company, she decides to find out first-hand how her retreats are doing so she can fix potential problems before expanding the business to 300 new locations

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Bruce 'Two Dogs' Bozsum, the chairman of a Native American gaming and entertainment empire, goes undercover among his own employees to learn how he might be able to improve his organisation and ensure it flourishes for generations to come. He poses as a reality TV contestant who is trying to win funds to start up his own business, before revealing his true identity and offering rewards to some of the memorable people he has met

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Berkshire, beauty therapist Emma and her boyfriend Sean kick off the week with an night of acronyms, pet names and fine food.
