programme.title: Ragdoll
programme.desc: Rose's erratic behaviour raises questions for Edmunds, but Baxter won't listen. With the killer one step ahead, her plans to protect the third victim go awry, with devastating consequences, and frustratingly they are forced to watch the Ragdoll Killer's horrific plans play out

programme.title: The Life of Brian (Maguire)
programme.desc: The story of renowned artist Brian Maguire, who uses his work to tell the stories of those who have fallen by the wayside and reflect the injustices of the real world. The film follows Maguire as he spends time on the US Mexican border giving workshops to migrants fleeing drug violence and finding the locations in the Arizona desert where undocumented migrants have died from dehydration and starvation. He then processes these experiences in his studios in Dublin and Paris

programme.title: Peacock
programme.desc: Andy Peacock is diagnosed with low testosterone and is in a mood. Kara endorses a preworkout that has unfortunate side effects and Jonathan and Eunice start a steamy affair. Can Andy get his manly mojo back? Comedy, starring Allan Mustafa

programme.title: EuroNews
programme.desc: European and international headlines live via satellite

programme.title: Lennon's Last Weekend
programme.desc: A look at the musician's final interview, given to Radio 1 DJ Andy Peebles two days before the former Beatle was murdered, intertwined with footage and commentary from friends

programme.title: Electric Light Orchestra: Discovery
programme.desc: A 1978 concert by the band

programme.title: Electric Light Orchestra: Live - The Early Years
programme.desc: Highlights from three of the band's concerts in the 1970s, featuring performances at Brunel University and the New Victoria Theatre in London and on German TV show Rockpalast

programme.title: Isle of Wight Festival 2024
programme.desc: Highlights from Saturday at the festival, featuring performances by acts including Pet Shop Boys, Keane and Blossoms

programme.title: André Rieu
programme.desc: A concert by the Dutch violinist and his Johann Strauss Orchestra in his home town of Maastricht, with Lou Bega joining them on stage to perform his hit Mambo No 5

programme.title: Kinky Boots
programme.desc: A performance of the musical in which Charlie attempts to save the family shoe factory by creating a line of sexy footwear modelled by a vivacious drag queen with perfect feet

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: An unhappy man decides to give up on his boring marriage - but his wife seems unwilling to co-operate

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: An ambitious politician turns vigilante in an effort to crack down on violence

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A young man discovers a window in a peaceful hunting lodge leads to a strange world

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A woman's marriage is blown apart when she meets a dashing young writer. Bizarre drama, written by Ruth Rendell

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A fortune teller sees her own destiny in the cards of a man who has just arrived in town

programme.title: The Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.sub-title: I'll Be Judge - I'll Be Jury
programme.desc: Relatives of a murdered newlywed decide to bring the killer to justice themselves. Drama, starring Peter Graves and Albert Salmi

programme.title: The Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: While renting a room at a farmhouse, a disturbed woman becomes fascinated by a seven-month-old boy whom she believes is her son. With Gena Rowlands and Nancy Kelly

programme.title: Chicago (2002)
programme.desc: Two female jailbirds imprisoned for murder pull out all the stops to seize the attention of the media. Aided by a slick lawyer, both women are desperate to find fame and fortune and escape the death penalty by winning public sympathy. Musical, starring Renee Zellweger, Catherine Zeta-Jones, Richard Gere, John C Reilly and Queen Latifah

programme.title: Discovering Film
programme.desc: A look at the life and career of the actor, best known for his Oscar-nominated performance in 1959 drama Room at the Top and his role in 1962 thriller The Manchurian Candidate

programme.title: Classic Movies: The Story Of
programme.desc: Ian Nathan examines Richard Attenborough's biopic of silent film actor, writer and director Charlie Chaplin, which starred Robert Downey Jr in the title role

programme.title: Tina Turner - What's Love Live
programme.desc: The singer's concert at the Blockbuster Pavilion in San Bernardino, California, which was part of her What's Love tour in 1993

programme.title: Simon & Garfunkel: Old Friends - Live on Stage
programme.desc: A 2003 concert by the duo at Madison Square Garden in New York City, featuring a guest appearance by the Everly Brothers

programme.title: Classic Albums
programme.sub-title: John Lennon - John Lennon/Plastic Ono Band
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the making of John Lennon's first solo album John Lennon/Plastic Ono Band, which includes Mother, Love and Working Class Hero. The programme uncovers how themes of isolation, anger, religion and class were drawn from his own experiences, with most tracks written while he was undergoing therapy with Dr Arthur Janov in California. Featuring contributions by Yoko Ono, Ringo Starr, Klaus Voorman and Jan Wenner

programme.title: John & Yoko: Above Us Only Sky
programme.desc: The story of John Lennon's album Imagine, released in 1971, exploring how the art, politics and music of the pair are intrinsically entwined. Featuring interviews with Yoko Ono, Julian Lennon, David Bailey, John Dunbar, Dan Richter and Eddie Veale, some of whom have never spoken publicly on film before, as well as previously unseen footage of Lennon and Ono from their private archive

programme.title: Bootsy Collins at Jazz à Vienne
programme.desc: A 2011 concert by the bassist at the French jazz festival, featuring performances of One Nation Under a Groove, Don't Stop the Music and Mothership Connection (Star Child)

programme.title: Down the Tracks: The Music That Influenced Led Zeppelin
programme.desc: Exploring the music that helped shape the rock band, including the blues and English folk music, as well as influence of the novels of JRR Tolkien

programme.title: Classic Albums
programme.desc: The making of Black Sabbath's second album Paranoid, which was released in 1970 and helped define the sound and style of heavy metal. The programme tells the story of how Ozzy Osbourne, Tony Iommi, Geezer Butler and Bill Ward created the record, and features contributions by Phil Alexander, Geoff Barton, Henry Rollins and Jim Simpson

programme.title: Discovering Music
programme.desc: Music critics look at the career of the English rock band, whose hits include The Love Cats, In Between Days, Just Like Heaven and Friday I'm in Love

programme.title: Pavarotti: A Voice for the Ages
programme.desc: A look back at some of Luciano Pavarotti's finest moments on stage, including performances of Nessun Dorma and other arias from La Boheme, Rigoletto and Aida. Also featured is Donna non Vidi Mai, dedicated in her presence to Diana, Princess of Wales, in London's Hyde Park, audience favourites O Sole Mio and Torna a Surriento, as well as duets with Bono, Sting and Eric Clapton

programme.title: Sir Bryn Terfel and Friends: Songs of the Sea
programme.desc: Bass-baritone Sir Bryn Terfel transports audiences to his Welsh homeland where the romantic coast becomes the inspiring start of a captivating musical journey

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A couple encounter a shady mechanic while making a trip across the desert

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A lonely alcoholic is delighted when she bumps into an old friend from university, but he might have an ulterior motive for seeing her

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: An echo from the past comes back to haunt a ruthless executive, and his wife becomes suspicious

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: Colonel George Peregrine's comfortable life is disturbed when his wife writes a raunchy novel that becomes a best-seller and he becomes convinced she is having an affair. With Joss Ackland, Pauline Collins, Rupert Frazer and Gareth Thomas

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A surgeon saves the life of a wealthy patient and receives a wonderful gift - but his new asset proves a fearful liability. Starring John Alderton and Alison Fiske

programme.title: The Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: After a mild-mannered man commits a murder, he becomes a juror in the trial of the man accused of the crime he committed. With Dean Jagger and Betty Field

programme.title: The Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: A paralysed woman must somehow communicate the fact that her husband is a killer before she becomes his next victim. With Michael Rennie and Phyllis Thaxter

programme.title: Ian Fleming and the Curse of Bond
programme.desc: A look at the enduring appeal of 007 and how the books and the character of James Bond reflected the author's own life and the top-secret naval intelligence operations in which he played a leading part during the Second World War. Featuring contributions from Ralph Fiennes, Kate Mosse, Percival Everett, Marlon James, Alexis Albion, William Boyd and Nicholas Shakespeare, with excerpts from the books read by Helena Bonham Carter

programme.title: Jean-Michel Jarre Live in Sevilla
programme.desc: A 2025 concert by the French electronic music pioneer in the Spanish city's Plaza de España, featuring performances of Oxygene, Equinoxe, Robots Don't Cry and Stardust

programme.title: The Beach Boys: Endless Harmony
programme.desc: A profile of the American band, featuring archive footage and interviews with band members and musicians such as Jackson Browne, Glen Campbell, Elvis Costello and Sean Lennon

programme.title: Tea with Judi Dench
programme.desc: The actress welcomes long-time friend and sometime collaborator Kenneth Branagh to her country home, where they chat about their lives and careers. Peppered with archive and anecdote, the programme provides personal biography and career highlights, along with lively conversation, funny insights and genuine candour and emotion

programme.title: Blithe Spirit (2020)
programme.desc: A spiritualist medium holds a seance for a writer suffering from writer's block, but accidentally summons the spirit of his deceased first wife. That leads to an increasingly complex love triangle with his current spouse of five years. Director Edward Hall's take on the Noel Coward comedy, starring Isla Fisher, Dan Stevens and Leslie Mann

programme.title: Dolly Parton: Song by Song
programme.desc: The singer discusses the success of the song I Will Always Love You, and why refusing to allow Elvis Presley the chance to cover it was one her best business moves

programme.title: Dolly Parton: Song by Song
programme.sub-title: It's All Wrong, But It's All Right
programme.desc: The singer recalls how she shocked the country and western scene with her 1978 hit It's All Wrong, But It's All Right. With contributions by Miley Cyrus and Lily Tomlin

programme.title: Opry Live
programme.sub-title: Craig Morgan, Rhonda Vincent, Steven Curtis Chapman, Sal Gonzalez
programme.desc: A selection of performances from world-famous Nashville music venue the Grand Ole Opry, featuring Craig Morgan, Rhonda Vincent, Steven Curtis Chapman and Sal Gonzalez

programme.title: Greatest Basslines
programme.desc: Foo Fighters founder member Nate Mendel explores the vital power of bass in music, swapping stories with friend and former Nirvana bassist Krist Novoselic

programme.title: Ennio: The Maestro
programme.desc: Documentary by Giuseppe Tornatore celebrating the life and legacy of Italian composer Ennio Morricone, featuring Interviews with renowned directors and musicians

programme.title: Record On
programme.sub-title: Record On: The Specials - A Message to You
programme.desc: A profile of the band, spanning the decades from the band's formation to later albums Encore and Protest Songs

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: A mass murderer is identified and the whole squad is put on 24-hour surveillance. Daniel Baldwin, Ned Beatty and Richard Belzer star

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street

programme.title: Fish Town
programme.desc: The cameras follow three teams of fishermen participating in Brixham's annual Trawler Race, including a father and son who have been pitted against each other. programme.desc: Lewis and Kellerman investigate a murder in a motel where all the guests are possible suspects. Police drama, starring Reed Diamond, Clark Johnson, Daniel Baldwin, Ned Beatty and Richard Belzer

programme.desc: A prospector arrives in town with a blueprint for a significant mining operation. Swearengen's ailing health brings cause for concern, although he refuses all offers of medical attention. Meanwhile, Farnum finds a buyer for the Hickok letter

programme.title: Deadwood

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: Swearengen wakes up to fresh trouble in the town when a county commissioner delivers news that puts everyone's gold claims in jeopardy, and Alma pays Trixie a visit when she finds herself in a different kind of trouble. Ian McShane and Molly Parker star

programme.desc: Things look bleak for a seriously ill Swearengen as Doc Cochran informs him that surgery is his only option, while Bullock makes an attempt at domesticity and rumours begin to spread about the camp's future. Starring Ian McShane, Timothy Olyphant and Brad Dourif

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: Swearengen wakes up to fresh trouble in the town when a county commissioner delivers news that puts everyone's gold claims in jeopardy, and Alma pays Trixie a visit when she finds herself in a different kind of trouble. Ian McShane and Molly Parker star

programme.title: The White Lotus
programme.desc: A group of demanding vacationers arrive at a luxury resort in Sicily, where Tanya turns up with her new assistant, and a family deals with a conspicuous absence. Jennifer Coolidge and Aubrey Plaza star

programme.title: The White Lotus
programme.desc: Harper questions Cameron and Daphne's claims about their marriage, and Tanya enlists Greg to help her live out her perfect Sicilian day. Starring Jennifer Coolidge and Aubrey Plaza

programme.title: The White Lotus
programme.desc: Harper decides that she is going to change her tack and be a more pleasant version of herself for the day, a move which throws the other guests completely. Starring Aubrey Plaza

programme.title: The White Lotus
programme.desc: Tanya and Portia spend a day with charming British expat Quentin and his nephew Jack, while Harper is blindsided by shocking evidence from Ethan's night out

programme.title: The White Lotus
programme.desc: Tanya and Portia embark on a whirlwind excursion with Quentin and Jack. Unsure what to believe, Harper gets real with Cam and Daphne

programme.title: The White Lotus
programme.desc: Ethan grows suspicious of Cam, Tanya gives Portia a warning about Jack, and Lucia helps the Di Grassos search for long-lost relatives

programme.title: The White Lotus
programme.desc: Albie asks Dominic for a karmic payment to help Lucia, Tanya grows wary of Quentin's motives, Ethan confronts Cam, and Valentina gives Mia a chance

programme.title: Prisoner
programme.desc: While being tracked down, Amber and Tibor turn the tables on Nina and hitch a ride to London in the back of a lorry, unaware that their driver has sold them out. Action thriller, starring Tahar Rahim and Izuka Hoyle

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: Though she would never say it out loud, Nate going broke finally granted Cassie permission to follow her dreams

programme.title: Atomic
programme.desc: Max and JJ are forced to try and secure safe passage to Marrakech through Syria, a country that hides a troubled past for one of them. Meanwhile, Cassie's former CIA colleague Mark Ellis lands in Syria to help her catch the two fugitives. Action adventure, starring Alfie Allen and Shazad Latif

programme.title: The White Lotus
programme.desc: Ethan grows suspicious of Cam, Tanya gives Portia a warning about Jack, and Lucia helps the Di Grassos search for long-lost relatives

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: Lewis and Kellerman find themselves in the middle of a drug war when they investigate a series of murders

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: Drama offering a look at the complexities of life in a social-media obsessed world, starring Zendaya, Jacob Elordi and Sydney Sweeney

programme.title: Heated Rivalry
programme.desc: The captain of the New York Admirals has a life-changing encounter that challenges his public image and the private life he's fought to protect. Drama starring Hudson Williams and Connor Storrie about two ice-hockey players whose on-ice animosity conceals a secret romance between the two

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming explores the history of Bristol, beginning by learning a grisly secret at the docks before meeting Mercury Prize-winning musician Roni Size to discuss life in the St Pauls and Stokes Croft areas of the city. He also explores the district of Clifton and visits a speakeasy-style bar

programme.title: Interview with the Vampire (1994)
programme.desc: A man who claims to be 200 years old tells a reporter his story of how he was bitten during an encounter with a decadent and charismatic vampire in 18th-century New Orleans. He relates how his respect for the sanctity of human life clashed with his blood-lust, and how the pair came to be adoptive parents to a young girl. Gothic horror based on the novel by Anne Rice, with Tom Cruise, Brad Pitt, Kirsten Dunst, Antonio Banderas and Christian Slater

programme.title: True Romance (1993)
programme.desc: A shy clerk marries a hooker and kills her pimp, and together they go on the run to Los Angeles with $5million of cocaine they plan to sell. However, the drugs belong to the Mob and hitmen are soon on their trail. Tony Scott's thriller, written by Quentin Tarantino and starring Christian Slater, Patricia Arquette, Dennis Hopper, Gary Oldman, Val Kilmer, Brad Pitt and Christopher Walken

programme.title: Speak Like a Child (1998)
programme.desc: A couple are reunited with a man they grew up with in a children's home years earlier - but the apparently happy reunion soon dredges up dark secrets from their past, and it's not long before tensions bubble to the surface. Drama, starring Cal Macaninch, Daniel Newman, Richard Mylan and Rachel Fielding

programme.title: Fools Rush In (1997)
programme.desc: An American architect agrees to marry a Mexican photographer after she falls pregnant after their ill-advised one-night stand. However, they quickly discover the pitfalls of their decision as cultures clash and sparks begin to fly. Romantic comedy, starring Matthew Perry, Salma Hayek, Jon Tenney and Carlos Gomez

programme.title: The First Wives Club (1996)
programme.desc: Three former college friends reunite at the funeral of a mutual acquaintance, who killed herself after her husband left her for a younger woman. Finding themselves in a similar situation, the trio decide to take action and hit their former partners where it hurts most - their finances. Comedy, starring Goldie Hawn, Bette Midler, Diane Keaton, Maggie Smith, Dan Hedaya, Bronson Pinchot and Elizabeth Berkley

programme.title: The Wedding Singer (1998)
programme.desc: A failed rock star carves out a career as a popular wedding singer, but his hopes for a bright future are dashed when his fiancee jilts him at the altar and he tries to shut himself off from the outside world. At one of his functions, a waitress catches his eye - but unfortunately for him, she is already engaged to someone else. Romantic comedy set in the 1980s, starring Adam Sandler and Drew Barrymore

programme.title: Sleepless in Seattle (1993)
programme.desc: A widowed father is coping badly with his wife's death, but his son is convinced that what he really needs is some new romance in his life. He arranges for his dad to go on a radio phone-in show, and his touching story moves a reporter to respond, even though she is already engaged. She returns to her fiance, but the boy, certain she is the woman for his father, plots to bring them together. Romantic comedy, with Tom Hanks and Meg Ryan

programme.title: Jerry Maguire (1996)
programme.desc: An idealistic sports agent produces a mission statement at work promising to treat clients fairly. Unfortunately, it costs him his job. Forced to set up an agency on his own, the only people prepared to stand by him are a lovelorn staff accountant and a footballer. Cameron Crowe's romantic comedy drama, with Tom Cruise, Renee Zellweger, Kelly Preston, Jonathan Lipnicki, and Cuba Gooding Jr, who won an Oscar for his performance

programme.title: The Firm (1993)
programme.desc: Harvard law graduate Mitch is headhunted to work for a prestigious law firm, despite his wife's warnings that it is too good to be true. After two of his colleagues are murdered, Mitch is approached by the FBI and informed the company is controlled by the Mafia - leaving him in a deadly predicament. Thriller, adapted from the novel by John Grisham, starring Tom Cruise, Gene Hackman, Jeanne Tripplehorn and Holly Hunter

programme.title: Interview with the Vampire (1994)
programme.desc: A man who claims to be 200 years old tells a reporter his story of how he was bitten during an encounter with a decadent and charismatic vampire in 18th-century New Orleans. He relates how his respect for the sanctity of human life clashed with his blood-lust, and how the pair came to be adoptive parents to a young girl. Gothic horror based on the novel by Anne Rice, with Tom Cruise, Brad Pitt, Kirsten Dunst, Antonio Banderas and Christian Slater

programme.title: Se7en (1995)
programme.desc: An old-school detective and his headstrong new partner discover a connection between two unusually horrific murders, and realise they are on the trail of a serial killer who deems his victims to be each guilty of one of the seven deadly sins. However, the longer the cops pursue the murderer, the ever more twisted and disturbing the slayings become. David Fincher's thriller, starring Brad Pitt, Morgan Freeman, Gwyneth Paltrow and Kevin Spacey

programme.title: The Mummy (1999)
programme.desc: A soldier of fortune joins an academic and her conniving brother on an expedition to an ancient Egyptian lost city. The explorers accidentally cause the spirit of a vengeful priest with awe-inspiring supernatural powers to rise from his tomb, leading to a desperate battle for survival. Fantasy action adventure, starring Brendan Fraser, Rachel Weisz, John Hannah, Arnold Vosloo and Oded Fehr

programme.title: Anaconda (1997)
programme.desc: Film-makers venture deep into the Amazon jungle to document the lives of a remote tribe. However, the expedition is hijacked by a crazed hunter who plans to use them as bait to catch a gigantic killer snake. Adventure, starring Jennifer Lopez, Jon Voight, Ice Cube, Eric Stoltz and Jonathan Hyde

programme.title: Goodfellas (1990)
programme.desc: An Irish-Italian boy from a poor neighbourhood grows up idolising the glamorous lifestyle of the Mafia. Taken under the wing of a mobster, he rises quickly in the world of organised crime. But he soon has to face the realities of murder and treachery, while his involvement in drug deals puts him at risk from both sides of the law. Martin Scorsese's crime drama, starring Ray Liotta, Robert De Niro and an Oscar-winning Joe Pesci

programme.title: From Dusk Till Dawn (1996)
programme.desc: A crook and his unhinged brother take a preacher's family hostage and cross the border into Mexico. They head to a rough strip club to make a planned rendezvous with a third party - but they soon have to live on their wits when they realise that the establishment's staff are vampires. Horror, starring George Clooney, Harvey Keitel, Quentin Tarantino, Juliette Lewis and Salma Hayek

programme.title: Tremors (1990)
programme.desc: A dull American town in the middle of the desert is suddenly attacked by huge man-eating subterranean creatures. Luckily, two dim-witted but brave handymen step into the breach to lead a ragtag bunch of locals and a mismatched pair of survivalists in the battle against the gruesome worm-like monsters. Comedy horror, with Kevin Bacon, Fred Ward, Finn Carter, Michael Gross, Reba McEntire and Bobby Jacoby

programme.title: Free Willy (1993)
programme.desc: A troubled youngster befriends a captive killer whale while working at a marine park. However, their friendship looks set to be short-lived when he learns the park's greedy owners plan to kill the animal, forcing the boy into a race against time to release the creature back into the ocean. Family drama, starring Jason James Richter, Lori Petty and Michael Madsen

programme.title: Hook (1991)
programme.desc: Peter Pan, who has finally grown up and is now a married lawyer with a family of his own, is whisked away by Tinkerbell to Neverland, where he must learn to fly again if he is to save his children from the clutches of Captain Hook. Steven Spielberg's fantasy adventure, with Robin Williams, Dustin Hoffman, Julia Roberts, Bob Hoskins and Maggie Smith

programme.title: Jurassic Park (1993)
programme.desc: Scientists are given a sneak preview of a safari park inhabited by genetically engineered dinosaurs created by an eccentric tycoon. However, it all goes wrong when a greedy employee sabotages the security systems, allowing the prehistoric beasts to roam free and hunt the visitors. Steven Spielberg's action adventure, starring Sam Neill, Laura Dern, Jeff Goldblum, Richard Attenborough and Samuel L Jackson

programme.title: The Lost World: Jurassic Park (1997)
programme.desc: Scientist Dr Ian Malcolm reluctantly joins a research team on the island where his employer first designed genetically engineered dinosaurs. Meanwhile, a big-game hunter takes the chance to bag the biggest prize of all - a Tyrannosaurus rex. Steven Spielberg's dinosaur adventure sequel, starring Jeff Goldblum, Julianne Moore, Pete Postlethwaite and Richard Attenborough

programme.title: Anaconda (1997)
programme.desc: Film-makers venture deep into the Amazon jungle to document the lives of a remote tribe. However, the expedition is hijacked by a crazed hunter who plans to use them as bait to catch a gigantic killer snake. Steven Spielberg's action adventure, starring Sam Neill, Laura Dern, Jeff Goldblum, Richard Attenborough and Samuel L Jackson

programme.title: Waterworld (1995)
programme.desc: In the future, environmental disasters have left the planet flooded. A web-footed mutant mariner helps a woman and an orphan girl search for a mythical haven of dry land, with the help of a map tattooed on the child's back - but in the process has to fend off a villainous crew of nicotine-addicted pirates. Sci-fi adventure, starring Kevin Costner, Dennis Hopper, Jeanne Tripplehorn, Tina Majorino and Rick Aviles

programme.title: Gremlins 2: The New Batch (1990)
programme.desc: Cute furball Gizmo is reunited with his human friends Billy and Kate, who now work in the New York offices of an eccentric tycoon. However, it is not long before Gizmo has spawned a new generation of murderous carnivores, who quickly overrun the building - and a genetics lab where they produce even more startling mutations. Joe Dante's comedy sequel, starring Zach Galligan, Phoebe Cates, John Glover and Christopher Lee

programme.title: Tremors (1990)
programme.desc: A dull American town in the middle of the desert is suddenly attacked by huge man-eating subterranean creatures. Luckily, two dim-witted but brave handymen step into the breach to lead a ragtag bunch of locals and a mismatched pair of survivalists in the battle against the gruesome worm-like monsters. Comedy horror, with Kevin Bacon, Fred Ward, Finn Carter, Michael Gross, Reba McEntire and Bobby Jacoby

programme.title: The Shadow's Edge (2025)
programme.desc: A brilliant cyber-criminal gang evades the police's state-of-the-art surveillance system with a haul worth billions. Retired tracking expert Wong Tak-Chong is ushered back into active service to mentor rookie officer He Qiuguo and build an elite unit to stop the criminals. Action thriller, starring Jackie Chan, Zhang Zifeng and Tony Leung Ka-fai

programme.title: Don't Let's Go to the Dogs Tonight (2025)
programme.desc: An eight-year-old girl experiences life on her family's Rhodesian farm during the final stages of the Bush War. Drama, written, directed by and starring Embeth Davidtz, with Lexi Ventner and Zikhona Bali

programme.title: Honey Don't (2025)
programme.desc: California private detective Honey O'Donahue delves into a series of unusual deaths connected to a mysterious church. Co-writer/director Ethan Coen's comedy mystery, starring Margaret Qualley, Aubrey Plaza and Chris Evans

programme.title: We Bury the Dead (2024)
programme.desc: When an experimental military weapon accidentally devastates Tasmania, volunteers travel to the island to help authorities identify the dead. Among them is a Ava Newman, who secretly hopes to find her missing husband. However, some of the bodies seem to be returning to life. Horror, starring Daisy Ridley, Brenton Thwaites and Mark Coles Smith

programme.title: The Conjuring: Last Rites (2025)
programme.desc: Paranormal investigators Ed and Lorraine Warren take on one last terrifying case involving mysterious entities they must confront. Supernatural mystery drama, starring Vera Farmiga, Patrick Wilson and Elliot Cowan

programme.title: Wuthering Heights (2026)
programme.desc: Catherine Earnshaw is raised by her alcoholic father at a Yorkshire farmhouse, with Nelly Dean as a constant companion. Mr Earnshaw 'acquires' an orphaned boy named Heathcliff during one of his gallivants and gifts the waif to Cathy as her pet. The children become inseparable, and as adults they embark on a destructive relationship. Writer-director Emerald Fennell's drama based on Emily Bronte's romance, starring Margot Robbie, Jacob Elordi and Martin Clunes

programme.title: The Running Man (2025)
programme.desc: Desperate to save his sick daughter, Ben Richards enters a deadly televised competition where contestants must survive 30 days while being hunted by professional assassins. Director Edgar Wright's comedy thriller based on the Stephen King story, starring Glen Powell, Lee Pace and Josh Brolin

programme.title: Downton Abbey: The Grand Finale (2025)
programme.desc: In the summer of 1930, the Crawleys grapple with the threat of social disgrace when Mary finds herself at the centre of a public scandal. Romantic drama, starring Joely Richardson, Joanne Froggatt and Paul Giamatti

programme.desc: A mother and daughter grapple with what's left after a devastating accident reveals a shocking betrayal and forces them to rediscover themselves. Romantic comedy drama, starring Allison Williams, Mckenna Grace and Dave Franco

programme.desc: A stand-off between a small-town sheriff and mayor sparks a powder keg as neighbours are pitted against each other in Eddington, New Mexico. Modern-day Western, starring Joaquin Phoenix, Emma Stone and Pedro Pascal

programme.title: Murder in the Valleys
programme.desc: A new suspect emerges and with his chequered past, the police are convinced they have got their man, but the community is not so sure

programme.title: World's Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: The crimes of Angel Maturino Resendiz, known to some as the Railroad Killer, who is thought to have taken the lives of more than 23 victims before his execution in 2006

programme.desc: Examining how Howell Donaldson III terrorised a neighbourhood in Tampa, Florida in 2017, killing four random strangers

programme.title: Killing Mum and Dad
programme.desc: Indulging himself and his girlfriend in unaffordable luxury, Brian Blackwell killed his parents before another spending spree

programme.title: Britain's Most Evil Killers

Beth the German Shepherd is taken on an emergency trip to the vet and there is a profile of a dog capable of catching killers. Narrated by Ken Stott

programme.desc: Documentary following members of the New Zealand highway patrol as they witness the best and worst behaviour on the nation's busiest motorway

programme.title: Stop, Search, Seize
programme.desc: Documentary following the work of Ireland's border force officers as they fight to stop gangs of organised smugglers from bringing drugs, money, guns, cars and even exotic animals into the country

programme.title: UK Border Force
programme.desc: Officers at Heathrow's Terminal 3 question a passenger from Johannesburg arriving in London on a tourist visa, suspecting he may be planning to work in the country. Entry Clearance Officer Dan Brown, on secondment to the British High Commission in Delhi, encounters a man carrying false identity documents

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: Footage of criminal acts, featuring a man who turns on the cameras when cornered by officers and a high-speed cross-country police chase

programme.title: Caught on Dashcam
programme.desc: Fly-on-the-dashboard documentary showcasing outrageous road disasters, captured in video form by drivers' in-vehicle dashboard cameras

programme.title: Caught Red Handed
programme.desc: Police launch an operation to catch the criminals who stashed stolen goods in a wood, and a thief gets more than he bargained for when trying to steal from a launderette

programme.title: Caught Red Handed
programme.desc: A family plants a secret camera to catch a thief in the act, and a man joins in with a cross-country police pursuit. Presented by Dominic Littlewood

programme.title: Caught Red Handed
programme.desc: The secrets of cashpoint scammers are revealed and a couple come face to face with armed robbers, but refuse to hand over their money

programme.title: Forensics: Catching the Killer
programme.desc: The 2019 murder of Raymond Cullen that sparked an investigation where forensic and digital evidence exposed a shocking, calculated plot behind his death

programme.title: World's Most Evil Killers
programme.sub-title: Heriberto Seda - The New York Zodiac
programme.desc: The story of Heriberto Seda, a killer who goaded police and media during his spree and who claimed to kill based on his victims' star signs

programme.title: World's Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: Responsible for five murders, Joshua Wade avoided justice for years and later confessed to killings that started from when he was just 14.

programme.desc: Documentary lifting the lid on police investigations into some of the most incredible murder cases in criminal history

programme.desc: When Charlotte Murray didn't show up to spend her 34th birthday with her twin sister, their family knew something was seriously wrong

programme.title: Britain's Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: An examination of Mick Philpott, the notorious Derby father of 17 who murdered six children, five of them his own, when he set his own home on fire

programme.title: Forensics: Catching the Killer
programme.desc: Mum Karen Doubleday was found murdered in the woods near her home in 2002. The clue to finding her killer lay in pollen spores from the Ice Age

programme.title: Forensics: Catching the Killer
programme.sub-title: The Mum Who Never Came Home
programme.desc: After mum Michelle Gunshon disappeared, police found CCTV footage showing her with a mystery man. They managed to track him down, but where was she?

programme.title: The Real CSI: Miami

Cutting-edge forensics retrieve crucial evidence to crack the case

programme.title: Gascoigne (2015)
programme.desc: Documentary about Paul Gascoigne, which charts his rise to fame from his humble roots in the North East to the world stage and his subsequent personal problems. The film features an extensive interview with the troubled former footballing superstar, as well as comment from those who admired his skills, including Wayne Rooney, Jose Mourinho and Gazza's ex-England and Tottenham Hotspur team-mate Gary Lineker

programme.title: Spitfire (2018)
programme.desc: The story of the British single-seat fighter plane the Supermarine Spitfire, designed by RJ Mitchell and famous for its role in the Battle of Britain. Archive footage, new film of the aircraft in flight and interviews with the last surviving veterans who flew the plane in combat combine to tell its story

programme.title: David Frost Vs
programme.desc: Recalling some of the journalist's most famous interviews, beginning with his 1964 interview with Paul McCartney of the Beatles

programme.title: Tina (2021)
programme.desc: Born Anna Mae Bullock in 1939, Tina Turner has sold in excess of 100 million records and earned numerous plaudits including Grammy awards and induction into the Rock And Roll Hall Of Fame with her first husband, Ike Turner. She was the first woman to grace the cover of Rolling Stone magazine and dabbled in acting including a memorable performance opposite Mel Gibson in Mad Max Beyond Thunderdome. Following a prolonged period of ill health, Turner intends to retire from the spotlight with her second husband, Erwin Bach. She bids farewell to her fans in the emotional documentary Tina. Directed by Dan Lindsay and TJ Martin, the film invites the singer to reminisce about her turbulent life and career with glowing contributions from friends, family and fans including Oprah Winfrey and Angela Bassett

programme.title: Becoming Madonna
programme.desc: Documentary charting the singer's rise to stardom, built around a cache of recently uncovered audio tapes in which a young Madonna reflects on her extraordinary life and career. Plus, rare footage, unseen photos and interviews with family, friends and collaborators

programme.title: Boy George & Culture Club
programme.desc: A profile of the band, with members Boy George, Roy Hay, Mikey Craig and Jon Moss talking about the personal relationships behind the scenes

programme.title: Amy (2015)
programme.desc: Documentary portrait of soul, jazz and R'n'B singer-songwriter Amy Winehouse, whose untimely death in July 2011 followed a well-publicised history of drugs and alcohol abuse. Director Asif Kapadia traces Amy's rise and demise over the 13 years preceding her death, telling her story via her music and autobiographical song lyrics, video footage shot by friends and family, archive television clips, plus voiceover interviews with those who were personally and professionally close to her. Contributors include Pete Doherty, Mitch Winehouse, Tony Bennett, Mark Ronson and Tyler James

programme.title: Fatboy Slim: Right Here, Right Now
programme.desc: Documentary about the Big Beach Boutique II free event held in 2002, when an estimated quarter of a million people turned up to the concert on Brighton beach

programme.title: Pete Doherty: Stranger in My Own Skin
programme.desc: Documentary about the musician and Libertines co-frontman, filmed over the course of 10 years and charting his fight to overcome his demons and fight addiction

programme.title: Look Away
programme.desc: Documentary hearing from women groomed in their early teenage years by rock stars, as well as exploring the lengths the music industry went to in order to protect its own

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Experts explore the similarities between huge pyramids across the world, and hypothesise on whether extraterrestrials could have influenced their construction and design

programme.title: UFO Hunters
programme.desc: First-hand accounts from seasoned, decorated police officers who have had unbelievable but substantiated UFO encounters

programme.title: The Great British Dig: History in Your Back Garden
programme.sub-title: A Lost Tudor Hall in Odiham
programme.desc: Hugh Dennis and the team are in Odiham, Hampshire, searching for the house of Sir Frances Walsingham, the head of Elizabeth I's Secret Service. It is the first time the site has ever been dug, so with very little to go on, our team want to locate the house, work out its size and scale, and what Walsingham may have used it for. As part of the investigation, Hugh turns his hand to spy craft as he learns how Walsingham used to break codes

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.sub-title: A Norman Panic Room and a Mesolithic Fish Trap
programme.desc: Archaeological treasures in the west of Britain, including a rare medieval cemetery, a disappearing Mesolithic landscape, a mysterious iron age burial, and the ruins of a gothic masterpiece. Presented by Alice Roberts

programme.title: Mysteries from Above
programme.desc: Jaw-dropping animal spectacles, as witnessed from high above the Earth. Examples include a whirling herd of northern nomads, undersea behemoths showing off in the Pacific shallows, a US porcine stampede and ocean predators on the Florida coast

programme.title: Canadian Pickers
programme.desc: The gang examines jukeboxes, toy cars, and antique vehicles. Plus, a Calgary barber and licence plate collector trims both his beard and his wallet for the Cash Cowboys

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Experts investigate the work of Nasa and secret government files relating to extraterrestrial activity, looking for proof of alien contact in the recent or distant past

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Experts explore the similarities between huge pyramids across the world, and hypothesise on whether extraterrestrials could have influenced their construction and design

programme.title: The Sound and the Fury
programme.desc: Key events of the Second World War, beginning with Germany invading Poland, and touching on Japan's expansion in Asia. Plus, how Africa's colonies became key battlegrounds for power and resources

programme.title: The Lost Women Spies
programme.desc: Assigned to the British War Crime Investigation Unit in post-war Germany, British intelligence officer Vera Atkins pursued her agents' fate at Natzweiler and Ravensbrück. Piecing together testimonies, she insisted on obtaining official records to substantiate her findings for upcoming trials. While Vera sought justice for her girls, a letter challenged her verdicts on Noor?s fate. Suspicions of double agents led Vera to hunt down a Nazi mastermind. She was still to determine whether any agents had escapeed, and if not who had betrayed them

programme.title: U-Boat Wargamers
programme.desc: The story of the Women's Royal Naval Service (WRNS) who helped take down Germany's fearsome U-boats. Though the Admiralty was convinced the Allies had the expertise to defeat Germany, Gilbert Roberts and the Wrens started devising wargaming tactics to combat U-boat formations. Narrated by Derek Jacobi

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Alice Roberts heads to a farmer's field in Rutland to examine evidence of a Roman barn conversion, featuring a three-room spa, including underfloor and in-wall central heating. She also finds out about the excavation of one of Henry VIII's lost forts in Hull, and hears from a team that discovered stunning 10,000-year-old hunting tools near Scarborough

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.sub-title: Ice Age Camp and a Saint with Syphilis
programme.desc: In Scotland and northern England, Alice Roberts investigates an Ice Age camp, a mysterious medieval skeleton and the earliest evidence of salt making in Britain

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Alice Roberts joins archaeologists on digs of northern Britain, revealing a Roman Emperor's lost bath house, the sunken treasures of medieval pilgrims and a formidable fortress perched on top of a Scottish mountain

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Experts investigate the work of Nasa and secret government files relating to extraterrestrial activity, looking for proof of alien contact in the recent or distant past

programme.title: Ancient Aliens

programme.title: Combat Ships
programme.desc: The crucial role ships have played in international conflict over the past 500 years. This programme looks at early metal warships, and examines HMS Rattler's screw propeller in 1845 would lead to the revolutionary HMS Dreadnought in the 20th century

programme.title: Combat Trains
programme.desc: The story of the Great Locomotive Chase - an attempt by northern spies to steal steam locomotive The General during the American Civil War

programme.title: Combat Machines
programme.desc: Remarkable feats of military engineering, focussing on the robot that defused bombs both on foreign battlefields and British streets, and an astonishing Gulf War minelayer

programme.title: Cursed Histories
programme.desc: Elements, places, icons or events that seem to be plagued by what can only be described as a 'curse'. This episode focuses on a 'damned' amethyst gem, a devilish beast and the downfall of a family for several generations.

programme.title: Cursed Histories
programme.desc: The people, places and objects plagued by what can only be described as a curse. This episode considers a diamond with a sinister past, the bones of a world-famous bard, and a beach covered in 'cursed' stones

programme.title: Mysteries Unearthed with Danny Trejo
programme.desc: The presenter explores the world's most significant discoveries and the unexpected ways they were found. He begins by uncovering strange structures - from a revolutionary war era ship hiding under the streets of Manhattan, to a sprawling Roman villa unearthed in the backyard of an English home. Plus, the ancient Grecian maze long thought to be a myth

programme.title: The UnXplained: Mysteries of the Universe
programme.desc: Veteran actor William Shatner explores the Earth and beyond, in search of the universe's most fascinating, strange and inexplicable mysteries. This opening episode documents unidentified objects witnessed by military pilots, extraterrestrial probes flying through the solar system and a potential alien home world that may be hidden in the darkness of space

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Experts investigate the work of Nasa and secret government files relating to extraterrestrial activity, looking for proof of alien contact in the recent or distant past

programme.title: Ancient Aliens

programme.desc: Patterns in UFO and UAP sightings across the world. A strange formation is seen in the sky over the sleepy suburbs of Tinley Park, Illinois. The lights return for a second time almost to the date the following year

programme.title: The Abyss: Rise & Fall of the Nazis
programme.desc: How the failed coup on November 9, 1923 eliminated Hitler and then movement of some 55,000 members. The Führer and his National Socialist German Workers' Party achieved a miserable result in the 1928 Reichstag elections

programme.title: Combat Machines
programme.desc: Remarkable feats of military engineering, focussing on the robot that defused bombs both on foreign battlefields and British streets, and an astonishing Gulf War minelayer

programme.title: Instruments of Death
programme.sub-title: The English Civil War - The Battle of Naseby
programme.desc: Karl Ude-Martinez and Kevin Hicks explore how weapons and body armour were developed, beginning with a look at the impact of the 1645 Battle of Naseby during the English Civil War

programme.title: Mysteries from Above
programme.desc: Cameras capture the world from fresh and exhilarating perspectives. Using drones and satellite imagery, this instalment discovers a vanished Neolithic structure in an Irish field, an oasis in a Chinese desert and buried treasure in the UK

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Ancient astronaut theorists hunt for evidence linking Bigfoot to alien species from the distant past, and ask whether the ape-like creature, which some people believe inhabits forests, could be an extraterrestrial

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Ancient astronaut experts examine whether the minds of Einstein and Galileo could have been superhuman and explore extraterrestrial connections with the historical figures

programme.title: The Sound and the Fury
programme.desc: Events of 1941, when Hitler invaded the USSR. Plus, Operation Barbarossa stalled as winter hits and Soviet resistance - fuelled by propaganda - turned the tide

programme.title: The Lost Women Spies
programme.desc: How the capture of a key Nazi uncovered shocking realities. Amid demands for accountability, spymistress Vera Atkins and her team had to navigate murky waters to confront uncomfortable truths

programme.title: U-Boat Wargamers
programme.desc: The story of Gilbert Roberts, Jean Laidlaw and the Women's Royal Navy Service (WRNS) - aka the 'Wrens' - as they use revolutionary war gaming tactics to defeat Admiral Karl Dönitz and his Wolf Pack fleets of U-boats in the Battle of the Atlantic during the Second World War. Roberts and Laidlaw uncovered a fatal flaw in the Royal Navy's anti-U-boat strategy and developed their own countertactic. Their next task was winning over the Admiralty. Narrated by Derek Jacobi

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.sub-title: Anglo Saxon Gold and Rebellious Nuns
programme.desc: Alice Roberts joins archaeologists to explore Central England's past. She explores a dig beneath the runways of RAF Alconbury, which has uncovered a rural Roman site filled with mysteriously placed objects. In Winchester she visits a new housing development where an Anglo-Saxon cemetery has been discovered and a gold pendant has been found in a grave. She also tours a medieval nunnery near Windsor where archaeologists are attempting to learn about the women who lived within the convent

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.sub-title: A Norman Panic Room and a Mesolithic Fish Trap
programme.desc: Archaeological treasures in the west of Britain, including a rare medieval cemetery, a disappearing Mesolithic landscape, a mysterious iron age burial, and the ruins of a gothic masterpiece. Presented by Alice Roberts

programme.title: Britain's Secret Islands
programme.desc: A visit Rathlin Island to off the coast of Co Antrim, to explore a Neolithic stone tool factory, a unique upside-down lighthouse, and a Second World War shipwreck

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Ancient astronaut theorists hunt for evidence linking Bigfoot to alien species from the distant past, and ask whether the ape-like creature, which some people believe inhabits forests, could be an extraterrestrial

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Ancient astronaut experts examine whether the minds of Einstein and Galileo could have been superhuman and explore extraterrestrial connections with the historical figures

programme.title: Secrets in the Jungle
programme.desc: In the Australian rain forests of Lake Eacham, a scientist discovers a mysterious mouse-like creature that glows in the dark. Plus, strange cylindrical tubes are uncovered in the forests of India and hundreds of human bones are found in a Belizean cave

programme.title: Secrets in the Jungle
programme.desc: Off the coast of Tanzania, a puzzling site containing massive stone blocks is revealed on Kilwa Island. The discovery of giant animal bones baffle researchers in Australia, while hundreds of human bones are uncovered in a Guatemalan rain forest

programme.title: Battle 360
programme.desc: The naval attack on the Solomon Islands, which was the first American invasion of the Second World War, is reconstructed using CGI technology

programme.title: Bone Detectives: Britain's Buried Secrets
programme.desc: Tori Herridge and a team of scientists attempt to piece together the lives behind discovered bones, and find out what happened to these people and how they died. This episode comes from Andover, Hampshire, where the construction of a proposed car park outside the city has been held up by the discovery of remains from over 100 young men. The bones are discovered to date back to Anglo-Saxon times, but appear to have been left in a mass grave rather than granted the Christian burial that was normal for their era

programme.title: Alien Corridors
programme.desc: In 2018, Alaska suffered a powerful earthquake that led to threats of a tsunami. Though the tsunami never occurred, one notable result of the quake was the increase in UFOs observed in the skies. But how does seismic activity link to sightings?

programme.title: Killer Kings
programme.desc: The case against six formidable kings who have left an indelible mark on the world and a look at new evidence that could lead to the world looking at them in a different light. First, a look at the reign of Henry VIII, remembered for his six marriages, the brutal treatment of his spouses and separating the Church of England from papal authority

programme.title: Nazi Murder Mysteries
programme.desc: Some of the most shocking cases connected with the regime's bloody reign, beginning with the case of Hitler's niece Geli Raubal, who was found dead in his apartment in 1931. Even now, it's not known if she died at her own hands, or was a victim of Hitler's overbearing affections

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Ancient astronaut theorists hunt for evidence linking Bigfoot to alien species from the distant past, and ask whether the ape-like creature, which some people believe inhabits forests, could be an extraterrestrial

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Researchers claim hidden messages can be found within the works of Leonardo da Vinci and other artists that may reveal an extraterrestrial influence

programme.title: Battle 360
programme.desc: Second World War battles are reconstructed using cutting-edge CGI animation, beginning by showing how the aircraft carrier USS Enterprise battled enemy submarines in the Pacific

programme.title: The Abyss: Rise & Fall of the Nazis
programme.desc: A fresh look at the Third Reich from a global and current perspective. This episode recalls how a social protest turned into a racist and anti-Jewish movement during the 1920s. The NSDAP deliberately used emotions to gain the loyalty of the people

programme.title: Craig Charles: UFO Conspiracies
programme.desc: Craig and space journalist Sarah Cruddas turn their attention to reports of alien abductions, focusing on the case of Yorkshire policeman Alan Godfrey in November 1980. The duo examine Godfrey's claims he was confronted head-on by a diamond shaped craft hovering in the road as he was coming off his night shift. Alan believed he 'lost' 25 minutes, during which time he was on board the craft being medically examined by small beings and a tall man with a beard

programme.title: Conspiracy Files: Unsealed
programme.desc: Investigating evidence that suggests the US military has been under attack from aliens for the past 50 years, asking if a huge secret could be being kept out of the public eye

programme.title: Knut: The Viking Emperor
programme.sub-title: The Revenge of a Landless King
programme.desc: The life and exploits of Knut the Great, who claimed the crowns of England, Norway and Denmark and forged an unprecedented union between Nordic and Anglo-Saxon lands

programme.title: Hardcore Pawn
programme.desc: A man tries to sell a series of poorly stuffed animals, leading to to an unusual threat being made against Les

programme.title: Hardcore Pawn
programme.desc: A woman sells an artistic statue of an old woman in a bathing suit, but when Les buys it, Seth blames Ashley for contributing to the purchase

programme.title: Hardcore Pawn
programme.desc: The store is divided as Ashley and Seth lay claim to their own individual turfs, while a fake ID puts Les in an awkward situation. Documentary series following the daily running of a pawn shop

programme.title: Hardcore Pawn
programme.desc: Ashley and Seth continue continue their tense stand-off, but a demanding customer forces them to band together. A signed and authenticated Elvis record stimulates interest, but Les and Rich are wary of paying too much for it

programme.title: Hardcore Pawn
programme.desc: Matters come to a head when Rich invades Ashley's territory in the jewellery and loan department

programme.title: Hardcore Pawn
programme.desc: Ashley hires a woman to work at the jewellery counter, without consulting with Seth or Les. Questions about Ashley's skills are raised after suspicious transactions

programme.title: Hardcore Pawn
programme.desc: Les orders Seth and Rich to clean up the warehouse to make room for new merchandise. When nothing is done, the owner has doubts that his children are cut out for business

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: On Chicago's North Side, Mike and Jersey get VIP access to a sprawling historic home that features four floors of dazzling high-end antique toys

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: A seller comes in with an overcoat once owned by Lee Harvey Oswald. Corey checks out a 30-year-old Gibson guitar with a factory mistake and a rare Mike Tyson Nintendo game. Meanwhile, Rick and Corey check out a restored Second World War half-track

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Archaeologists and anthropologists make discoveries that receive little notice because they fail to fit into the accepted scientific paradigm, such as an ancient hammer found in Texas or elongated skulls found on nearly every continent

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Researchers suggest that the ancient site of Teotihuacan in central Mexico was once home to a highly advanced, perhaps extraterrestrial, civilization. Excavations at Teotihuacan have unearthed discoveries out of place in the ancient world

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Lauro begins the longest Iditarod in the history of the famous sled dog race, Mike hunts elusive and rare silver foxes along the shoreline of Kodiak Island, Chance works to support his family through sub-zero temperatures on the trapline, while Soraya prepares for the imminent arrival of their new baby

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Marty rebuilds a snowmobile from scratch, before facing off with a wolverine menace on his trapline. Lauro feels the fatigue on the Iditarod trail and makes a wrong turn in the dark. Bret and Ivy ascend high into the Alaska Range to hunt dall sheep

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: Documentary following brothers Marty and Rick Lagina as they search for the mysterious treasure buried on a Nova Scotia island, which is believed to be protected by a deadly curse

programme.title: Ramses the Great: King of Ancient Egypt
programme.desc: The life of Ramses II - also known as Ramses the Great - who was a pharaoh of Egypt during the New Kingdom, a period of great prosperity for the country. He was a powerful ruler who expanded Egypt's borders, built monuments, and signed the first international peace treaty during his reign from 1279 to 1212BC

programme.title: Ramses the Great: King of Ancient Egypt
programme.desc: The childhood years of Egyptian pharaoh Ramses the Great. It was largely spent in Luxor, where he was educated and prepared to become the heir to the throne

programme.title: Ramses the Great: King of Ancient Egypt
programme.desc: The secrets and lies of mighty pharaoh Ramses II, who ruled Egypt from 1279 to 1213BC - one of the longest reigns in pharaonic history. He was a cultural innovator, diplomat and self-promoter. He built monuments all over Egypt and as this documentary reveals became a caricature of his own propaganda for thousands of years

programme.title: Ramses the Great: King of Ancient Egypt
programme.desc: After five years' reign, Ramses II - also known as Ramses the Great - had already earned the distinction of being the most feared and respected among the martial pharaohs. He personally led his army with the aim of re-conquering the kingdoms of the Levant

programme.title: Ramses the Great: King of Ancient Egypt
programme.desc: Ramses ruled Egypt for at least 29 years, although some Egyptologists think he could have ruled for as long as 30. Either way, it was one of the longest reigns in pharaonic history

programme.title: Ramses the Great: King of Ancient Egypt
programme.desc: Merenptah, the 13th son of Ramses II, the great pharaoh of Ancient Egypt. Merenptah became pharaoh after his father's long reign, when all of his older brothers had died. His reign was marked by feuds between rival branches of the family, and the throne was close to bankruptcy

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers head to Palm Springs, California, in search of higher-end goods. Kenny tries to amp up the profit on an otherwise unimpressive unit. Rene sees quick potential where others don't. Brandi and Bozek try to keep their gains from squirming away

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The sun beats down in Oceanside, California, bringing out all the parasols. Dusty and Lupe steal a no-brainer locker, which pays off handsomely. Darrell taxes himself, which almost puts him in storage jail. Brandi and Lisa find their true identities

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.sub-title: The Way of the Gam Gam
programme.desc: While in Santa Ana, Lisa 'channels her grandmother', in trying to turn a profit. Brandi contends with a tremendously frustrating day, Darrell tries to make a meal out of a snack-sized locker, while Kenny learns to prep himself for true stealthiness

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Lisa comes to Montebello with a clear mind, intent on letting the lockers 'speak' to her. Ivy lets his son navigate his way to a unit which turns out not to be completely vacant. Kenny is absolutely appalled by what he finds abandoned in his unit

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Alice Roberts spends a year visiting archaeological digs around the country, finding out about discoveries that shed new light on British history. In Buckinghamshire, Simon Mays and Jill Eyers use a recent rediscovery of artefacts from a 1912 excavation to investigate what appears to have been a mass infanticide during the Roman era. Alice also meets the team examining one of the largest discoveries of Roman coins ever made in Britain, and hears about a mystery in Dorset

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Alice Roberts visits Happisburgh in Norfolk, where the discovery of rare artefacts provides evidence of the earliest human occupation in Britain, challenging the conventional belief that mankind would not have been able to survive in northern Europe one million years ago. She also joins a team at Forteviot in Scotland, where the uncovering of a Bronze Age grave holds a big surprise

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War
programme.desc: The 1941 attack on Pearl Harbour introduced a powerful new element into the war. This documentary features eye-witness accounts and archive footage of the conflict in the Pacific

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War
programme.desc: With the United States joining the conflict, Western forces brought the war to the Axis front - with extreme costs. Meanwhile, German civilians were touched by devastation

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War
programme.desc: Japan's expansion into South East Asia, which saw the Allies attempt to block the empire's aggression. The war in the Pacific subsequently became even more brutal

programme.title: Mysteries Unearthed with Danny Trejo
programme.desc: The actor explores the world's most significant discoveries and the unexpected ways they were found

programme.title: Strange Evidence
programme.desc: A circle of wild turkeys parade around the body of a dead cat in an area known for witchcraft, while ghostly figures stalk the site of a bloody Civil War battlefield. A mysterious blue blaze is like nothing firefighters have had to deal with before near Yellowstone

programme.title: Strange Evidence
programme.desc: Cameras capture mysterious red lights shooting into the sky above the Alps, prompting scientists to try to recreate the phenomenon with an experiment. A pack of dogs rips a car apart, leaving experts searching for some possible motive

programme.title: Strange Evidence
programme.desc: A security camera capture of a ghostly figure stalking a Japanese taxi stand. Locals feared that even viewing the footage would put their lives in danger. Plus, a mysterious flame witnessed in the Norwegian wilderness

programme.title: What on Earth?
programme.desc: The series examines six more mysterious satellite images, including a possible smokescreen over North Korea, and two forgotten pyramids in Egypt

programme.title: What on Earth?
programme.desc: Photographs illustrate how the barely inhabited Australian Outback seems to light up like a network of vast cities when viewed from space

programme.title: What on Earth?
programme.desc: Documentary series exploring anomalies appearing on satellite images to try and get a better understanding of unexplained phenomena

programme.desc: A smelly bin scares away most bidders, but it ends up being a great score for T-Money. Brandon and Lori win a scary bin that may or may not have value. programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: Buyers haggle over a locker filled with vintage surfing gear. Brandon and Lori get a busted bin that contains a glass case filled with an unidentifiable goo. Later, things get overly intense during the day's final auction

programme.title: Storage Hunters

Terrell hits it big with a vault everyone thought was worthless and the Taylor brothers win a vault with a wet-bike

programme.title: Pawn Stars

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: A seller walks into the shop hoping to score with his Magic Johnson 50th birthday invitation. Chum takes a look at some joker playing cards used as props in The Dark Knight. Corey heads to the range to test out a Civil War-era derringer

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick tackles a football helmet signed by 28 Heisman Trophy winners, while Corey gears up to buy a devastatingly cool 'Transformers' toy for the shop. Rick tries not to go 'psycho' over an Alfred Hitchcock poster that makes a cameo in the shop

programme.title: Discovered by Disaster
programme.desc: Evidence that ties a meteor strike to a Biblical tale. Plus, the treasure-filled tunnel revealed by a sinkhole in Mexico

programme.title: Discovered by Disaster
programme.desc: The unexpected things revealed by catastrophic disasters, featuring a medieval shipwreck that could reshape history and a Greek version of Atlantis that sank in a tsunami.

programme.title: Discovered by Disaster
programme.desc: Why footprints discovered after a storm are altering English migration history by revealing evidence of early human activity that was previously hidden by the landscape. Such discoveries, often exposed by storm surges and erosion, are providing new insights into who was in England thousands of years ago and how they moved around. Plus, clues are unravelled to Maya political intrigue in Guatemala

programme.title: Commando Missions
programme.desc: The Heraklion Operation, carried out in June 1942. Major Georges Bergé's team landed in Crete and moved across land, intending destroy Luftwaffe planes at Heraklion airfield. They destroyed about 20 Ju 88s, but despite escaping from the airfield found their retreat betrayed

programme.title: Commando Missions
programme.desc: Operation Frankton, of December 1942. The mission was for Royal Marines to place limpet mines on German ships in the occupied Bordeaux Harbour, 62 miles along the Gironde River. Five cockleshell canoes set off from submarine HMS Tuna at the mouth of the river. Only two reached the harbour and carried out the raid, escaping with the aid of the French Resistance. The damage to the ships and the resulting disruption to German supply lines had a significant impact on the war effort

programme.title: The Lost Women Spies
programme.desc: The story of Britain's first female agents sent to the front line during the Second World War and spymistress Vera Atkins, who led them. In the tumult of the conflict, French Resistance fighters sought aid from Britain's Special Operations Executive (SOE) against Nazi occupation. Led by Romanian-born Atkins, SOE enlisted female agents including Odette Sansom and Noor Inayat Khan to take the fight to the Germans. As tensions soared, Noor navigated occupied France, while Atkins grappled with tough decisions. She and her team raced against time to safeguard SOE's mission, braving sacrifices for victory

programme.title: The Lost Women Spies
programme.desc: The story of Britain's first female agents sent to the front line during the Second World War and spymistress Vera Atkins, who led them. In the face of danger, Vera ramped up her recruitment of female agents. Chaos ensued as the Prosper circuit in Paris neared collapse. Meanwhile, Noor, deep in Parisian resistance, struggled to maintain cover. Vera enlisted agents like Violette Szabo and Yvonne Baseden, but uncertainty shrouds their upcoming missions

programme.title: The Lost Women Spies
programme.desc: Amid the chaos of D-Day, alarming wireless messages revealed Special Operations Executive (SOE) disloyalty. While concerns escalated, Allied troops advanced and Paris was liberated. SOE operations subsequently dwindled, prompting Second World War spymistress Vera Atkins to confront the harm done to her agents

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike meets a passionate Connecticut picker with major inventory. However, getting access to his collection means dismantling a massive, layered wall of stuff

programme.desc: The dog unit deals with a man who has barricaded himself in his house with his Rottweiler, while a woman thought to have overdosed disappears

programme.title: Police 24/7

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: Members of the Road Crime Unit chase a drug dealer on the M5, and the Tactical Aid group prepares for a raid to confiscate illegal substances. Meanwhile, dog handler Daryl and his German shepherd Murphy are on the trail of the drivers of a stolen car that crashed in Exeter

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: A man's body is found burned in a sugar cane field and phone records lead the team to his psychiatrist, the smart and seductive Dr Olivia Victor. McGarrett is convinced the woman is somehow responsible for her patient's demise, but she proves more than a match for the determined detective. Meanwhile, Catherine crosses paths with disgraced witness protection agent Chris Channing, who has information that spells danger for Doris

programme.title: S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: The team is put in charge of protecting a warlord ahead of his extradition - but there is a gang of assassins determined to take him out for good

programme.title: Border Patrol
programme.desc: Follow the work of the New Zealand Customs agents in their quest to prevent illegal items passing through the country's borders.

programme.title: Border Patrol
programme.desc: Follow the work of the New Zealand Customs agents in their quest to prevent illegal items passing through the country's borders.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: A polo player's chances of winning an upcoming match are severely reduced when he is decapitated riding his horse by a mystery assailant during a training session, leaving the Five-0 team with a particularly gory crime to solve. McGarrett enjoys a brief respite when his mother pays an unexpected visit, despite the fact she is still being targeted by Wo Fat. But as he soon realises, she is not the kind of woman to take orders from anyone. Alex O'Loughlin and Christine Lahti star

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Halloween presents the Five-0 team with a typically gory crime to solve - that of a nursing student who was kidnapped and cut to pieces while still alive. Initial evidence points to the black market in human organs, suggesting the killer wanted to sell hers to the highest bidder - but the autopsy reveals something much more sinister is afoot

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.sub-title: I Ka Wa Mamue (In a Time Past)
programme.desc: Danno's search for the members of a terrorist cell leads to a terrifying life-or-death situation when he activates a suicide bomb rigged to explode at the slightest movement or touch. As technicians set to work to free the nervous cop, McGarrett tries to distract his friend and colleague by getting him to talk about the toughest case of his career, flashing back to Danno's days as a detective in New Jersey, when he and his partner Grace were held hostage by mobsters. Scott Caan and Alex O'Loughlin star, with Terrence Howard (Iron Man)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer joins the power plant's softball team, confident his home-made bat will lead them to victory. However, Mr Burns upsets his dreams of glory by hiring Major League Baseball players instead

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Career aptitude tests have an unexpected effect on the Simpson kids, prompting Lisa to fall in with a bad crowd while perennial troublemaker Bart finds a new respect for law and order

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer goes to a Country and Western bar after a row with Marge, and vows to make the venue's singing waitress a star. programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Selma tells the family she is getting engaged to her prison pen-pal - none other than Sideshow Bob, who still harbours a grudge against Bart for landing him behind bars in the first place. Featuring the voice of Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart attends a rock concert with Milhouse, so Marge and Homer buy him a guitar to encourage his musical interests - but it is Otto who ends up calling the tune. Featuring the voices of Spinal Tap members Michael McKean and Christopher Guest

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Milhouse falls in love with a new girl at school and begins to spend all his time with her, so, in a bid to get his friend back, Bart decides to tell her strict Catholic father about the relationship

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer develops a knack for cooking and challenges Marge to a baking contest. Determined to win at any cost, she resorts to cheating in a bid to avoid humiliation. Meanwhile, Bart holds a 'Playdude' party attended by Hollywood veteran James Caan

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa is teased mercilessly by her classmates for having a weight problem. Marge learns school bully Nelson Muntz has never had a paternal role model and invites him to live with the family - much to Bart's dismay

programme.title: Secret World of Sound with David Attenborough
programme.desc: The broadcaster explores the ways different creatures hear and produce sound and how it can influence their decisions, using cutting-edge audio technology to reveal a new perspective and understanding of animal behaviour

programme.title: Secret World of Sound with David Attenborough
programme.desc: From melodic songs to strange hums, David Attenborough shares the sounds that gibbons, lyrebirds, bull elk and more use to find a mate - and warn off the competition

programme.title: Secret World of Sound with David Attenborough
programme.desc: A look at how baby animals communicate in their quest for survival, using sound to beg and call for help in the early days of life

programme.title: Men in Black II (2002)
programme.desc: Agent J investigates the unauthorised landing of a spacecraft and discovers a malevolent alien disguised as a lingerie model is on the verge of destroying humanity. His only hope of stopping her diabolical plot is to restore the memory of his retired partner K - but his former mentor takes more than a little convincing. Sci-fi comedy sequel, directed by Barry Sonnenfeld, starring Will Smith, Tommy Lee Jones, Rosario Dawson, Lara Flynn Boyle, Johnny Knoxville, Rip Torn and Tony Shalhoub

Plus, the team searches for an abducted Middle Eastern human rights activist, Luca's food truck business hits a snag; and Street worries that dating Captain Hick's daughter will have a negative impact on his career

programme.title: S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: The team searches for thieves on the run with a hi-tech thermal lance that can cut through almost anything. Chris confronts an imbalance in her relationship with Kira and Ty

programme.title: S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: Commander Hicks agrees to replace a seriously wounded sheriff's deputy in a hostage crisis after a family resisted eviction after having lived for four generations on the property. programme.title: The Office (US)
programme.desc: The Dunder Mifflin staff are horrified when Jo promotes Dwight to manager. The new boss swiftly sets about remaking the office in his own image - but a horrendous blunder puts his dream job at risk. Meanwhile, Gabe asks Andy not to go out with Erin. Comedy, starring Rainn Wilson, with Kathy Bates

programme.title: The Office (US)
programme.desc: Part one of two. Jim leads a search committee to recruit the next manager, but finds the pool of applicants less than stellar

programme.title: The Office (US)
programme.desc: Part two of two. The search committee tirelessly continues to look for the replacement for the next boss

programme.title: The Office (US)
programme.desc: Return of the US remake of the sitcom set in a paper supply company. In the first episode, the staff members are hit with a double whammy as Scranton gets a new regional manager and Robert California becomes Dunder Mifflin Sabre's CEO

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: She Used to Be My Girl
programme.desc: Marge is left feeling jealous and dejected by an encounter with old school friend Chloe (guest star Kim Cattrall), who has found fame, fortune and success as a high-flying investigative journalist

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Depressed at getting old, Bart wears a T-shirt to school bearing an adult joke, and is accosted by a marketing manager wanting to promote the new product. Meanwhile, Homer helps Lisa build a nuclear bomb for a school science project. Eric Idle guest stars

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Hard-hearted Mr Burns decides to deny his employees any more free medication, prompting Homer to whisk Grampa away on a drug-smuggling mission to Canada. Unfortunately, the duo fall foul of the authorities on their return journey

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A health inspector eats a pickled egg at Moe's and instantly drops dead. The authorities threaten to close the bar unless radical changes are made, prompting Homer to remortgage his house to help out his friend. However, Marge insists on becoming the new landlady - and no one is prepared for the consequences

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: Homer and Ned's Hail Mary Pass
programme.desc: Homer teaches victory dance moves to famous athletes, and proves so successful that he is chosen to produce the Super Bowl half-time show. Meanwhile, Ned gets backing from Mr Burns to create his own versions of Bible stories, but they are far from popular. With the voice of figure skater Michelle Kwan

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart disobeys Marge's wishes and attends a rap concert, where he ends up performing with the stars on stage.
