programme.title: Micro Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: David Attenborough employs the latest technologies to explore the violence, rivalries and deadly weaponry existing within the world of bugs. This first episode examines the survival tactics of its terrifying residents including killer ants, trap-setting spiders and beetles with the ability to shoot boiling chemicals at their enemies

programme.title: Micro Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: The broadcaster continues his bug-eyed view of the world of creepy-crawlies, revealing how predators defuse the defences of their prey. Highlights include the cockroach wasp, busy preparing a tasty - and very live - treat for its young, the whirligig beetle, which employs a water-based radar system, and the jumping portia spider, which feeds on other arachnids

programme.title: Micro Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: A further selection of creepy-crawly close-ups, focusing on courtship in the bug world. Highlights include scorpions shaking their booty, the perfume-wearing nasonia wasp and the tropical cricket, for whom romance goes out of the window as it uses bribery to seal the deal with would-be partners. One potential partner to steer well clear of, however, is the praying mantis, the female of which is notorious for eating the male just after - or even during - mating. Narrated by David Attenborough

programme.title: Micro Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: A close-up view of sex, bug-style, as David Attenborough talks viewers through the different ways in which creepy-crawlies reproduce. Size matters for the minuscule male orb spider, creepily sneaking up on its intended and trying to mate without her noticing, while there's no rest for the lothario-like butterfly, which has plenty of notches on its proverbial bedpost. However, the harvestman spider has no use for sex at all, and reproduces by cloning itself

programme.title: Micro Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: David Attenborough shifts the focus to bugs that prefer co-operation rather than conflict. They include burrowing cockroaches, the suitably named social spiders - which share a 30-metre web - the queen bee and her happy hive of workers and green ants pulling together to build a nest

programme.title: Micro Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: The broadcaster concludes his close-up examination of the creepy-crawly world, shifting focus to the bugs' ultimate invention - the colony. Key residents of these minuscule mega-cities include honey bees, termites, leafcutter ants - who have a knack for farming - and their Argentine cousins, members of a community so vast it spans an entire continent

programme.title: Spitfire (2018)
programme.desc: The story of the British single-seat fighter plane the Supermarine Spitfire, designed by RJ Mitchell and famous for its role in the Battle of Britain. Archive footage, new film of the aircraft in flight and interviews with the last surviving veterans who flew the plane in combat combine to tell its story

programme.title: Last Seen Alive (2022)
programme.desc: Will Spann is driving his soon-to-be ex-wife Lisa to her parents' home when she mysteriously disappears without a trace during a stop at a gas station. A frantic Will engages the local police and Lisa's parents in a desperate attempt to find her, but as time passes and suspicion falls on him, he must take matters into his own hands, delving into the town's criminal underbelly while running from the authorities in a race against time. Thriller, with Gerard Butler and Jaimie Alexander

programme.title: The Lawnmower Man (1992)
programme.desc: A scientist's ill-advised experiments with virtual reality equipment transform a mentally handicapped gardener into a computer-enhanced megalomaniac with the power to make his dreams of world domination come true. programme.title: The Royal We (2025)
programme.desc: A princess has abandoned her royal position for a simple life as a teacher. However, when her older sister walks out on an arranged marriage vital to her home country's future, she finds herself under pressure to step into the breech and marry a man she has never met. Romantic comedy, starring Mallory Jansen and Charlie Carrick

programme.title: David Attenborough's Conquest of the Skies
programme.desc: The veteran naturalist examines the world of flight, travelling across the globe to chart the evolutionary story of those creatures who seemingly defy the rules of gravity by taking to the air. Initially focusing on insects, Attenborough meets a descendant of the dragonfly, before examining the Atlas beetle, which tends to restrict flight to times when it needs a mate or a fresh supply of food. More aesthetically pleasing is a group of beautiful tropical butterflies, followed by an in-depth study into the blow fly - the jet fighter of insects

programme.title: David Attenborough's Conquest of the Skies
programme.desc: The veteran naturalist visits the jungles of Borneo to meet creatures that like to glide through life - the harlequin tree frog and the little-known colugo - often referred to, incorrectly, as a flying lemur. He also has a CGI-assisted encounter with the first true vertebrate flyer, the pterosaur, receives a flying lesson from a small flock of swans at Loch Lomond in Scotland and encounters the planet's largest species of bat

programme.title: David Attenborough's Conquest of the Skies
programme.desc: The veteran naturalist turns his attention to creatures that dominate the skies today. He begins with the vast bird family, watching a group of vultures as they go scavenging and some peregrine falcons dive bombing for their prey. He then moves on to the floating forests of Ecuador to find out what makes the humble hummingbird tick, before ending his journey at the Gomantong bat caves of Borneo - a place he first filmed in 1972 - witnessing a mass exodus of the creatures

programme.title: Caught Red Handed
programme.desc: A neighbourly dispute gets out of hand, a shop worker fears for his life when two violent men burst in, and a thief goes into a pet shop and steals a puppy

programme.title: Escape from New York (1981)
programme.desc: Former special forces soldier Snake Plissken is sentenced to life on Manhattan Island, an anarchic penal colony for the most dangerous criminals. When Air Force One is hijacked and crashes there, Snake is coerced into rescuing the US president from prisoners holding him hostage. John Carpenter's sci-fi action adventure, with Kurt Russell, Donald Pleasence, Lee Van Cleef, Adrienne Barbeau and Isaac Hayes

programme.title: Malawi Wildlife Rescue
programme.desc: Amanda meets one of the first cheetahs to be born in Malawi in 20 years, while tourists deliver a rowdy monkey rescued from the pet trade, and a python gets a check-up

programme.title: Wildlife ER
programme.desc: Bec patches up a bitten koala as new vets Ruby and Kerryn soothe a pack of itchy possums. Then, watch rescue officer Dani free a pair of trapped kookaburras

programme.title: Amazing Animal Friends
programme.desc: A troop of old male vervet monkeys in a South African rescue centre which has struck up a curious, yet mutually beneficial, relationship with three feral cats

programme.title: Guardians of the Wild
programme.desc: In 1997, black rhinos were declared extinct in Zambia. Thanks to an ambitious reintroduction plan, they are back. This documentary follows the team fighting to keep them safe

programme.title: Animals Like Us
programme.desc: Tenacious meerkat pups show their determination to devour deadly scorpions in the desert, while a group of lionesses demonstrate their seduction tactics

programme.title: Animals Like Us
programme.desc: The frigate bird likes to steal meals of food from smaller birds. The warthog enjoys a spa day, while the African elephant sends secret messages

programme.title: Wild Tales from the Farm
programme.desc: The hidden world of drama, friendship and rivalry on a British farm. Spring is in the air and life on the farm is bursting out everywhere, as twin lambs Larry and Flora leap for joy in the meadow with the other newborns

programme.title: Wild Tales from the Farm
programme.desc: Summer days mean the animals get to roam in the open meadows. Meanwhile, the Hebridean sheep stage a breakout, giving the sheepdog her first chance at a round-up

programme.title: Planet Weird
programme.desc: The world's most incredible wild creatures, revealing their strange behaviours and peculiar survival techniques

programme.title: Planet Weird
programme.desc: Discovering fireflies' flirty flashes, the tarsier's night vision, the mantis shrimp' punch and the saltwater croc's prey-detecting sensors

programme.title: Wild Survivors
programme.desc: A look at how countless strategies to reproduce have evolved, while the fight for a mate can be both deadly and beautiful

programme.title: Wild Survivors
programme.desc: It is the dry season in the Luangwa Valley and for herbivores food is hard to come by, but one animal's misfortune can be another's good luck

programme.title: Wild Survivors
programme.desc: A look at how Zambia's Luangwa Valley is in constant flux, influenced by the myriad of animals that call it home

programme.title: Secret Life of the Koala
programme.desc: Profile of the eucalyptus-eating, tree-hugging Australian icons. The creatures live in the east and south-east parts of the continent. This episode reveals how their behaviours differ in different regions

programme.title: Secret Life of the Koala
programme.desc: While koalas may seem lazy, their behaviour drastically changes during mating season. As the season of love begins, the documentary follows two males on a mission to mate

programme.title: Great Barrier Reef with David Attenborough
programme.desc: Following his visit to the Great Barrier Reef in 1957, naturalist and broadcaster David Attenborough returns and uses the latest filming techniques to unlock the secrets of the natural wonder. In the first edition, he descends beneath the waves at night and uses cutting-edge technology to generate computer scans of the sea floor. He also learns about a complex community of animals, as well as the annual coral spawning, which is responsible for the great diversity in the reef

programme.title: Great Barrier Reef with David Attenborough
programme.desc: Using the latest technology, the naturalist explores the shark-infested waters of Osprey Reef in the Triton submersible, before returning to the nesting grounds of the Green Sea Turtle, 60 years after his first visit to Raine Island. He also marvels at manta ray cleaning stations on Lady Elliot Island, and tracks dwarf minke whales to discover their surprising reasons for returning, and why the reef is vital for their survival

programme.title: Great Barrier Reef with David Attenborough
programme.desc: The naturalist examines what the next few decades may hold for this remarkable ecosystem, and looks at the work of scientists who are trying to preserve the area and the species that inhabit it, assisted by research vessel the Alucia. He also embarks on an ambitious attempt to dive further into the reef than ever before to witness the resilient coral that live down in the depths and see if they hold answers that may help to overcome challenges that lie ahead, as the impact of humans on the reef continues to take its toll

programme.title: Deadly Australians
programme.desc: As water flows from Australia's highlands into the seas, environmental changes set the stage for unexpected clashes between predators and their prey

programme.title: Big Cat Country
programme.desc: After the dry season lowers the waters, siblings Kimba and Maya risk crossing the river to search for their parents. They run the gauntlet of the densest populations of crocs and hippos in Africa

programme.title: Gladiators
programme.desc: A look at life in tropical forests, featuring a poison dart frog launching a toxic barrage and turf war between jaguars and caimans

programme.title: Gladiators
programme.desc: Heading to America's far north for a look at its waterways' fighters, as a spring thaw pits eagles against herons and dragonfly nymphs against venomous water bugs

programme.title: Ningaloo: Australia's Ocean Wonder
programme.desc: Observing the natural and human forces that have shaped this area, discovering a million-year-old fossil reef, a gargantuan fish and a ray that packs quite a punch

programme.title: Big Cat Country
programme.desc: After the dry season lowers the waters, siblings Kimba and Maya risk crossing the river to search for their parents. They run the gauntlet of the densest populations of crocs and hippos in Africa

programme.title: Aussie Snake Wranglers: Deadly Pursuit
programme.desc: The deadly world of snake catching Down Under. Breeding season bites as Mick and Adele rescue a Jack Russel from a python. Mick also corners a red-bellied black snake

programme.title: Aussie Snake Wranglers: Deadly Pursuit
programme.desc: Dan and Jess tackle mating eastern browns in a backyard. Mick also finds a venomous snake in couch cushions

programme.title: Qatar: Pearls in the Sand
programme.desc: The desert peninsula of Qatar, exploring its landscape and inhabitants, as well as its transformation from being a centre for pearls, to being known for oil and gas production

programme.title: Africa's Underwater Wonders
programme.desc: A look at the sandy shallows between the islands and islets of Mozambique's Bazaruto archipelago

programme.title: Living Beach
programme.desc: Australia's Fraser Island, the largest sand island in the world, which boasts a variety of landscapes, including coastal heathland, open woodlands and tropical rainforests

programme.title: Cub Camp
programme.desc: The journey of abandoned cub Winston, who bonds with Judy as she nurses him, before she teaches him to become independent

programme.title: Cub Camp
programme.desc: Following a trio of starving orphans, who turn Winston's world upside down before gentle Xola teaches him a lesson about friendship

programme.title: City Wildlife Rescue
programme.desc: The work of a team in Toronto who help small animals in the big city. The staff fall in love with an adorable bundle of baby possums and set out on a mission to rescue a mother and her ducklings

programme.title: City Wildlife Rescue
programme.desc: The staff care for baby bunnies injured in a dog attack and the centre's release team introduce an abandoned cygnet to an adoptive mother swan

programme.title: City Wildlife Rescue
programme.desc: The search begins for a Cooper's hawk who's taken a dangerous dip in a backyard pool. Plus, the centre's skunks try to avoid getting their shots

programme.title: City Wildlife Rescue
programme.desc: When a baby mink is abandoned in a store, the team gets to work on some behavioural training. But will this sweet little one be tough enough for the wild when they're done?

programme.title: Into the Wild: India
programme.desc: Many power battles await a Tibetan wild stallion as it follows a female herd for the chance to sire the next generation

programme.title: Into the Wild: India
programme.desc: The far-from-lazy life of sloth bear mum Bibi as she is forced to fight drought, food shortages and predators to keep her two cubs safe

programme.title: My Wild Cats
programme.desc: Observing five unique feline species as they try to make a comeback in the wild

programme.title: My Wild Cats
programme.desc: Observing five unique feline species making a comeback in the wild and their courage and resilience as they try to thrive in a changing world

programme.title: Deep Dive North America
programme.desc: Documentary delving into North America's southern coastal waters, where opalescent squid mate, sea turtles nest and mobula rays soar in romantic displays

programme.title: Deep Dive North America
programme.desc: Lizzie Daly explores North America's natural wonders, swimming through coral reefs, excavating ancient fossils and trekking through jungles on tropical shores

programme.title: Predators
programme.desc: A notorious brotherhood of cheetahs rule the southern plains of the Serengeti, until a raging bushfire turns their world upside down

programme.title: Aussie Snake Wranglers: Deadly Pursuit
programme.desc: The deadly world of snake catching Down Under. Breeding season bites as Mick and Adele rescue a Jack Russel from a python. Mick also corners a red-bellied black snake

programme.title: Aussie Snake Wranglers: Deadly Pursuit

programme.title: Qatar: Pearls in the Sand
programme.desc: The desert peninsula of Qatar, exploring its landscape and inhabitants, as well as its transformation from being a centre for pearls, to being known for oil and gas production

programme.title: David Attenborough's Galapagos
programme.desc: The broadcaster explores the Galapagos, a collection of volcanic islands in the Pacific known for its extraordinary wildlife. More than 150 years after Charles Darwin formulated his ground-breaking theory of evolution on the remote archipelago, Attenborough explains how life on the islands has continued to evolve in biological isolation, examining how the ever-changing volcanic landscape has given birth to species and sub-species that exist nowhere else in the world. He begins by revealing how Galapagos rose from the ocean four million years ago

programme.title: David Attenborough's Galapagos
programme.desc: The broadcaster reveals how life has learnt to adapt quickly in the ever-changing volcanic landscape, resulting in species that exist nowhere else in the world. David investigates the driving forces behind their evolution, exploring the appearance and behaviour of remarkable creatures and vegetation including giant whale sharks, marine iguanas and seemingly normal dandelion seeds that grow into plants the size of trees

programme.title: David Attenborough's Galapagos
programme.desc: The broadcaster concludes his exploration of the archipelago with a look at how, despite their proximity, no two of the 19 islands are the same. He also uncovers evidence that evolution on Galapagos is occurring faster than Charles Darwin could ever have imagined, and encounters Lonesome George, the last remaining giant Pinta Island tortoise, who died just a few weeks after filming in June 2012

programme.title: Aussie Snake Wranglers: Deadly Pursuit
programme.desc: The deadly world of snake catching Down Under. Breeding season bites as Mick and Adele rescue a Jack Russel from a python. Mick also corners a red-bellied black snake

programme.title: Aussie Snake Wranglers: Deadly Pursuit
programme.desc: Dan and Jess tackle mating eastern browns in a backyard. Mick also finds a venomous snake in couch cushions

programme.title: Qatar: Pearls in the Sand
programme.desc: The desert peninsula of Qatar, exploring its landscape and inhabitants, as well as its transformation from being a centre for pearls, to being known for oil and gas production

programme.title: Rooted
programme.desc: The unique hidden worlds to be found in Southern Africa's most iconic trees. Trees are an invaluable resource in the windswept grasslands of Africa's southern Kalahari, providing huge numbers of animals with food and shelter

programme.title: Ningaloo: Australia's Ocean Wonder
programme.desc: This edition maps out the ecological links, migratory pathways and interspecies bonds that conserve Ningaloo's biodiversity

programme.title: Ningaloo: Australia's Ocean Wonder
programme.desc: How Ningaloo's conservation success could inspire hope for the future and help bring the planet back from the brink of climatic destruction

programme.title: Wild Rockies
programme.desc: Getting up close and personal with the animals that live in the Rocky Mountains. The predator-prey relationship is a delicate balance in the Rockies, where elk and moose live alongside bears and wolves

programme.title: Wild Rockies
programme.desc: A look at how some creatures manage to defy gravity among the highest peaks on the continent, where the air is thin and cold and even trees cannot survive

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Nick and Hank battle a powerful Wesen who has become a vigilante carrying out deadly punishments for human criminals. Meanwhile, Juliette learns the truth about Nick's mother, and Adalind has an ultrasound with unusual results

programme.title: Fantasy Island
programme.desc: Empty nesters Dolly and Dutch seek clarity on how to spend their next chapter, while Helene helps Ruby tap into her newfound youth

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The group faces a new enemy, and Rick and his clan are forced to fight to protect their hard-won livelihood. Walkers gather around the prison fences and attempt to break them down. Post-apocalyptic drama following the exploits of a former County Sheriff struggling to survive in the aftermath of a zombie epidemic, starring Andrew Lincoln

programme.title: Intergalactic
programme.desc: With Ash in need of urgent medical attention, the Hemlock makes a stop on Candy's home planet Skov, which is war-torn and under attack from the Commonworld. As Genevieve's feelings for Drew continue to develop, Emma's true motives for stopping on Skov are revealed and Ash's real allegiances are revealed

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: Yvette Fielding and the team explore Hall i'th' Wood, a 16th-century manor house in Bolton steeped in tales of spectral mists and sounds of disembodied footsteps

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: The team visits the Exeter Old Courts, where many lawbreakers were sentenced to death, including the notorious Bideford witch

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: Yvette Fielding and the team visit Beaumaris Gaol on Anglesey, north Wales, where a story about unrequited love is the backdrop to investigations into ghostly phenomena

programme.desc: Yvette Fielding and the team visit Brougham Hall, Cumbria, where they are party to a ghostly family get-together

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise
programme.desc: Tucker is stunned to discover he is pregnant after sharing an intimate moment with a female engineer aboard a stricken alien ship. Sci-fi drama, starring Connor Trinneer

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise
programme.desc: The crew investigates Terra Nova, a mysterious human colony that has evolved far beyond Archer's expectations. Scott Bakula and Jolene Blalock star

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise
programme.desc: T'Pol joins the crew on a visit to an ancient Vulcan monastery, despite objecting that her human shipmate's presence could be a disruptive one. On landing, they are shocked to discover the spiritual sanctuary has been taken over by the Andorians, a paranoid race of aliens with a long history of conflict with the Vulcan people. Sci-fi adventure, starring Scott Bakula and Jolene Blalock

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise
programme.desc: While the crew researches a newly discovered comet, Archer tries to deal diplomatically with a the suspicious crew of a Vulcan vessel that is watching the ship. Scott Bakula and Jolene Blalock star

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise
programme.desc: The team members discover an inhabited Earth-like planet named Akaali and disguise themselves to look like its citizens in order to undertake an exploratory expedition. The crew learns the inhabitants are suffering from mysterious plague-like lesions and tries to help them find the cause. Scott Bakula and Jolene Blalock star

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Part one of two. Annorax, the Krenim's desperate leader, vows to manipulate time to alter the course of history and wipe out the enemy that annihilated his own colony - and quite possibly take out Captain Janeway's starship in the process. Sci-fi adventure, starring Kate Mulgrew and Robert Beltran

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Part two of two. Chaos reigns as Annorax continues his mission to change history and eliminate entire civilisations, putting a proposal to Chakotay and Paris, who have been beamed aboard his ship. Paris balks at the thought of helping Annorax, but Chakotay insists they should trust him in a bid to continue their journey home, and even refuses to exploit a weakness they discover in the weapon-ship

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Janeway and the crew encounter a telepathic race whose psychic abilities result in violence. Kate Mulgrew, Robert Beltran and Roxann Dawson star

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Janeway enlists Leonardo da Vinci's help to track down the pirates who robbed the ship of valuable equipment. John Rhys-Davies guest stars

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Neelix, Chakotay and Paris are sent on a dangerous away mission deep inside a class-one nebula. Sci-fi drama, with Ethan Phillips, Robert Beltran and Robert Duncan McNeill

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The Governor prepares his forces for war as the second meeting with Rick's prison group draws near, and with all hope of a peaceful resolution seemingly gone, Andrea decides she must warn her old friends they are about to walk into a trap. However, when she escapes from Woodbury, the town's brutal leader finds a new point of focus for his fury. Post-apocalyptic drama, starring David Morrissey and Laurie Holden

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick and the group are faced with a serious problem - if they want a truce with the Governor, they will have to make a huge sacrifice. Post-apocalyptic drama following the exploits of a former County Sheriff struggling to survive in the aftermath of a zombie epidemic. Starring Andrew Lincoln

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick and the group must consider whether the prison is worth defending as the Governor's impending attack looms large. Post-apocalyptic drama following the exploits of a former County Sheriff struggling to survive in the aftermath of a zombie epidemic. Starring Andrew Lincoln

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Nick, Hank and Wu search for two missing teenagers, and realise they have been taken by an evil spirit of Christmas that plans to eat them as punishment for being naughty. Elsewhere, Renards' tour of Europe brings him closer to tracking down Adalind

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: A priest is murdered by a boy he is performing an exorcism on. Nick and Hank investigate the case, which leads them to the Wesen Council. Meanwhile, Renard leaves town to deal with the situation in Europe

programme.title: Intergalactic
programme.desc: When law-abiding space cop Ash Harper is convicted of a crime she did not commit, she is sentenced to exile and loaded onto prison spaceship the Hemlock. Her mother Rebecca, who is head of galactic security, is determined to prove her daughter's innocence and bring her safely home, but any hopes of a reunion are dashed when Ash's fellow convicts overthrow the guards and hijack the Hemlock. Sci-fi drama, starring Savannah Steyn and Natasha O'Keeffe

programme.title: Intergalactic
programme.desc: As the Hemlock fugitives set about salvaging their crash-landed ship, Ash makes her escape through an alien desert and makes an unwelcome acquaintance in the form of scruffy space-pirate Echo Nantu-Rose. Meanwhile, Rebecca's fears over her daughter's plight are compounded when she learns that terrorist organisation ARC was behind Ash's wrongful imprisonment

programme.title: Intergalactic
programme.desc: Drifting through space without the co-ordinates to Arcadia, the crew encounters another setback - the Hemlock is running out of power. Ash, Verona and Echo embark upon a race-against-time heist at Commonworld fuel reserve NAR-59, but with Dr Emma Grieves still aboard and her mission incomplete, Ash must aid and abet her fellow fugitives just enough to avoid suspicion - a strategy with devastating consequences

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: Yvette Fielding and the team visit Boys Hall in Kent, a 17th-century Jacobean mansion where the appearance of an ancient coin puzzles the ghost hunters

programme.desc: Cassandra suddenly develops uncontrollable telekinetic powers, which threaten both her own future and that of the team. Sci-fi drama, starring Richard Dean Anderson, Michael Shanks and Collen Rennison

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Daniel's friend Chaka is imprisoned by slave traders - but when the team comes to his aid he refuses to leave. Sci-fi drama, starring Michael Shanks and Dion Johnstone

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: The team joins forces with its Russian counterpart to search for missing soldiers in a Babylonian temple guarded by a mysterious alien creature. Sci-fi drama, starring Richard Dean Anderson

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: The Tollans share their technological secrets with High Chancellor Travell, but Jack and Teal'c discover they have an ulterior motive. Sci-fi drama, starring Richard Dean Anderson

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: The team meets the apparently benign Aschen Confederation, who seem eager to trade technology, but the coordinates of their planet coincide with those that Jack's counterpart from the future warned to avoid. Sci-fi drama, starring Richard Dean Anderson

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Dr Weir is driven to the conclusion one of the team is a traitor, and suspicion soon falls on their new friends the Athosians. Unfortunately for Teyla, she finds herself caught in the middle of the conflict

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Sheppard encounters the members of a youthful race who have convinced themselves the Wraith only feed on fully mature adults, and all commit suicide at the age of 24 to ensure there is no chance of ever falling victim. Joe Flanigan and Torri Higginson star

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Sheppard and the team visit a strange world whose desperate inhabitants have devoted all their energies to developing a drug intended to make them immune from the attacks of the Wraith

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: The crew finds the Genii people on a nearby planet and opens up trade relations with them, but Sheppard and McKay soon discover these apparently simple farming folk are not quite as benign as they seem

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: McKay comes up with a plan to harness the energy of a strange planet's misty atmosphere, supplying everyone with an opportunity to make a trip back to Earth - although they fear they may not be able to return to Atlantis. Sci-fi drama, starring David Hewlett

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The post-apocalyptic drama returns, picking up with Rick and his band of survivors as they work to re-establish a measure of normality in their prison home following their high-octane conflicts with residents of Woodbury. However, while the immediate threats to their lives are beginning to recede, they face an uphill battle to hold on to humanity in the face of much more pervasive dangers

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The group faces a new enemy, and Rick and his clan are forced to fight to protect their hard-won livelihood. Walkers gather around the prison fences and attempt to break them down. Post-apocalyptic drama following the exploits of a former County Sheriff struggling to survive in the aftermath of a zombie epidemic, starring Andrew Lincoln

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Hank and Nick encounter an urban legend in the Portland sewers. Renard faces up to the recent assassination attempt on his life and Prince Viktor arrives in Europe to bring those responsible for the demise of his cousin Eric to justice. Fantasy crime drama, starring David Giuntoli, Russell Hornsby and Sasha Roiz

programme.title: SurrealEstate
programme.desc: A neighbourly conflict draws the Agency into a feud and Phil's sister arrives to settle the family will

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: A Russian creature with healing powers finds his past catching up with him, and Juliette protects a friend from her abusive husband - but does not realise she is not human

programme.title: Intergalactic
programme.desc: After the robbery, the authorities are closing in on the gang. With a sky-high bounty on their heads, it might be time to abandon ship

programme.title: Intergalactic
programme.desc: With Ash in need of urgent medical attention, the Hemlock makes a stop on Candy's home planet Skov, which is war-torn and under attack from the Commonworld. As Genevieve's feelings for Drew continue to develop, Emma's true motives for stopping on Skov are revealed and Ash's real allegiances are revealed

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: Yvette Fielding and the team investigate ghostly phenomena in the 19th-century military building Spitbank Fort, where a violent and unpredictable lonesome spirit is said to roam

programme.title: Jumanji (1995)
programme.desc: A man who has been trapped inside a mysterious jungle board game for 26 years is eventually freed when two children start to play it. Unfortunately, he arrives with a rampaging horde of animals on his heels, leaving only one solution - to finish the game he started all those years ago. Fantasy adventure, starring Robin Williams, Kirsten Dunst and Bonnie Hunt

programme.title: Ocean's 8 (2018)
programme.desc: Following in the footsteps of brother Danny, light-fingered Debbie Ocean plans to steal the Toussaint, a $150million necklace from Vogue's Met Gala, with the 'help' of a famous actress. Crime caper, starring Sandra Bullock, Cate Blanchett, Anne Hathaway and Mindy Kaling

programme.title: Ocean's Twelve (2004)
programme.desc: The crooks reunite when an old enemy catches up with them and demands they repay the money they stole from him three years previously. In response, the gang comes up with another larcenous plan - but reckons without the interventions of a fellow thief and a sultry Interpol agent. Crime caper sequel, starring George Clooney, Brad Pitt, Julia Roberts, Catherine Zeta-Jones, Matt Damon, Andy Garcia and Don Cheadle

programme.title: Jumanji (1995)
programme.desc: A man who has been trapped inside a mysterious jungle board game for 26 years is eventually freed when two children start to play it. Unfortunately, he arrives with a rampaging horde of animals on his heels, leaving only one solution - to finish the game he started all those years ago. Fantasy adventure, starring Robin Williams, Kirsten Dunst and Bonnie Hunt

programme.title: Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle (2017)
programme.desc: Four teenagers play a jungle-themed game on an old console, only to find themselves transported into the game and transformed into its heroic characters. They must embark on a death-defying journey through the game's wilderness setting to make it back to the real world, or be stuck as video game characters forever. Fantasy action comedy, starring Dwayne Johnson, Karen Gillan, Kevin Hart and Jack Black

programme.title: Jumanji: The Next Level (2019)
programme.desc: Players of Jumanji return, but as they attempt to rescue one of their own, they will have to brave parts unknown from arid deserts to snowy mountains, to escape the world's most dangerous game. Director Jake Kasdan's fantasy adventure sequel to his 2017 rebooted hit Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle, starring Dwayne Johnson, Karen Gillan, Kevin Hart and Jack Black

programme.desc: Documentary following Britain's emergency helicopter medical services. The pressure is on as teams race to the scene of a traffic accident in rural Oxfordshire where a family car has left the country road and plummeted 30ft into a ravine. Finally, the search is on for a lost paraglider - yielding surprising results

programme.title: Réalta Agus Gaolta
programme.desc: Síomha Ní Ruairc hosts the latest search for Ireland's most talented family, as the best singing, dancing and musical families the nation has to offer compete against each other. Judging the families are sean-nós singer Irial Ó Ceallaigh and broadcaster Sinéad Ní Uallacháin, joined this week by guest judge Séamus Ó Flatharta. The Conamara native is a champion harp and whistle player, dancer and singer and comes from a family steeped in Irish traditional music

programme.title: Bean an Tí sa Chistin
programme.desc: Máirín Uí Threasaigh from Galway takes on Miséil De Grás from Waterford for a place in the semi-final, as the chefs battle to remain in the competition

programme.title: Comhrá

programme.title: Saol Clainne
programme.desc: Tomás ó Flannagáin gives a portrait of life as a young carer, while Deirdre Wadding shares her story of time spent in Bessborough. Aoife Nic Sheáin fears for her family's future due to faulty mica blocks

programme.title: My 600lb Life
programme.desc: Chuck weighs almost 50 stone and it has hindered every aspect of his life. This film follows his efforts to take control and reclaim the life and independence that is slipping through his fingers

programme.desc: A shy astrology columnist finds his life thrown into chaos when a sex-obsessed American takes over as editor and sets him an unusual assignment. programme.title: Love Your Garden
programme.desc: Alan Titchmarsh and the team make over a family garden in south Wales, for the benefit of father-of-three Chris Garlick, who lost his hands and feet to sepsis just 22 months earlier. Katie Rushworth creates a contemporary water-feature-cum-bench that would look good in any garden and Frances Tophill shows how soft naturalistic planting with the emphasis on scent can create the perfect garden for wellness

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Originally from India, Bindu grew up with a garden full of vegetables, nature and birdsong and would like to recreate a bit of that in her modest garden in Warrington, Cheshire. The garden is a sun trap, so she and partner Vivek want some height and shade in the plot as well as raised beds for fruit and veg growing. It's very important to them that they try and care for the environment too so would like the means to harvest rainwater and compost waste. With a relatively small budget of £3,000, Charlie Dimmock and Lee Hull create a garden that is both eco-friendly and looks beautiful

programme.title: Night Watch (1995)
programme.desc: An investigation into the theft of Rembrandt's painting The Night Watch leads to trouble for two UN troubleshooters. Their investigations take them from Amsterdam to Hong Kong, where they uncover a fiendish plot masterminded by a cunning millionaire. Crime thriller based on the Alistair MacLean novel, starring Pierce Brosnan, Alexandra Paul, William Devane and Michael J Shannon

programme.title: Skyfire (2019)
programme.desc: Tianhuo Island is a remote paradise where businessman Jack Harris is about to open a new holiday resort. With its stunning views and the chance to tour the dormant volcano, visitors flock there to experience the sights. But when the mountain decides to wake up, it creates terror in its wake. Director Simon West's disaster thriller, starring Jason Isaacs, Alice Rietveld and Xueqi Wang. In Mandarin and English with subtitles

Drama, starring Helen Mirren and John Shea

programme.title: Cruel Passion (1977)

Historical drama based on the novel Justine by the Marquis de Sade, starring Koo Stark and Martin Potter

programme.desc: A landlord goes after an allegedly delinquent tenant when the police notify him of disturbances on his property.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: A father is surprised to find that his wife sent their three children to live with her sister; he fights to get them back but is sued for travel expenses.

programme.title: UK Crime Files: No Honour Killing

programme.desc: Geoffrey Wansell explores the case of George Shotton, who murdered his wife near Swansea in 1919. This episode features expert interviews.

programme.title: UK Crime Files: Boarded Barn Murders
programme.desc: Award-winning author Simon Toyne travels to Cheshire to investigate the opportunistic crimes that took place at a remote barn house in Congleton.

programme.title: UK Crime Files: Murder Of The Secret Millionaire
programme.desc: Donal MacIntyre revisits the story of a millionaire murdered in Hammersmith. With no friends or family, detectives used CCTV footage to track three suspects.

programme.title: UK Crime Files: The Tenant From Hell
programme.desc: Geoffrey Wansell revisits the case of David Ellis, who murdered landlord Alec Warburton in Dolwyddelan, North Wales, before fleeing to Ireland.

programme.title: UK Crime Files: Secret Life and Public Death
programme.desc: Jackie Malton examines the 1988 murder of Danny Denbury in Newport, killed in his home by ex-soldier Christopher McGovern following a night out.

programme.title: UK Crime Files: The Blackpool Poisoner
programme.desc: Geoffrey Wansell explores how Louisa Merrifield poisoned elderly employer Sarah Ricketts at her Blackpool bungalow for inheritance and was hanged at Strangeways Prison.

programme.title: UK Crime Files: Child Killers
programme.desc: Simon Toyne travels to Liverpool to unravel the notorious story of the murder of James Bulger, who was abducted and killed by two 10-year-old boys.

programme.title: Britain's Countryside Killers
programme.desc: The story of 15-year-old Kayleigh Haywood, who was groomed online by Luke Harlow and murdered by Luke's neighbour, Stephen Beadman.

programme.title: Killers: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: The story of what happened when, in the UK, CCTV exposed Megan Newton's murderer, with blood on his hands.

programme.title: Fatal Fall: Murder or Accident?
programme.desc: The tragic case of aspiring model Rhonda Casto, who fell 150 feet to her death from a narrow mountain trail in Oregon's Columbia River Gorge.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: A woman sues her estranged wife's daughter for allegedly assaulting her on Thanksgiving; the holiday ends with a black eye and a night in jail.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The priest encounters a man who intends to solve his father's murder a year earlier with the use of his brand-new invention - a time machine. Fifties-set crime drama, starring Mark Williams

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The team investigates the shooting of a murder suspect, and there is no shortage of potential culprits, with his angry wife and vengeful brother high on the list. There's just one little puzzle to solve before the cops can even think about whodunit - at the time of the killing, the victim was in police custody, behind three locked doors guarded by Dwayne and JP. So how did the shooter manage to slip through undetected? As if that wasn't enough for Humphrey to worry about, he also has an unexpected visit from his father (guest star James Fox), with whom he doesn't exactly see eye to eye

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: When a young woman is abducted from the place her friend was murdered two years earlier, Charlie and Rex discover she was trying to solve a cold case

programme.desc: After a small aeroplane crashes in downtown Toronto, killing the pilot, Murdoch discovers it was deployed with deadly chemicals

programme.title: Miss Scarlet and the Duke
programme.desc: When Detective Fitzroy sees one of his colleagues plant evidence on a suspect, he hires Eliza to look into a case of police corruption in Scotland Yard. Crime drama set in Victorian London, starring Kate Phillips and Stuart Martin

programme.title: Inspector George Gently
programme.desc: The detective looks into the suspicious death of an old friend and informant. The investigation leads him to the local police station, where it becomes clear the officers are hiding something - and to complicate matters, the disappearance of a teenage boy is also linked to the case. Crime drama, with Martin Shaw, Lee Ingleby and guest stars Neil Pearson, Dean Lennox Kelly and Mark Benton

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The priest encounters a man who intends to solve his father's murder a year earlier with the use of his brand-new invention - a time machine. Fifties-set crime drama, starring Mark Williams

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The priest investigates when a body is found at the stone circle in a polio-stricken village, leading him to conclude that dark forces are involved - and another sacrifice could be imminent. Fifties-set crime drama based on the stories by GK Chesterton, starring Mark Williams

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: When a man is found dead inside a locked bank vault, Father Brown must solve the mystery to save an innocent man from paying the ultimate price. Fifties-set crime drama based on the stories by GK Chesterton, starring Mark Williams as a Roman Catholic priest who attempts to solve various misdemeanours

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The priest finds himself in a seemingly impossible situation when he is told during a confession that Bishop Talbot will be assassinated tomorrow. Fifties-set crime drama based on the stories by GK Chesterton, starring Mark Williams

programme.title: Saint-Pierre
programme.desc: Fitz and Arch work with a Newfoundland Officer from Fitz's past to apprehend an infamous bank robber who has escaped to Saint-Pierre

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: Crime series that revolves around the special partnership between new detective Mark Hudson, who has recently joined SJPD's Major Crimes Division, and Rex, an extraordinary former K9 dog. Mark and Rex must hunt down a key witness against a notorious crime boss before a hired assassin finds him first

programme.title: Allegiance
programme.desc: A call to a motel leads Sabrina and Vince into the underbelly of a migrant worker trafficking ring. Ishaan sends Kyle undercover to meet a white supremacist

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A desert island survival course goes wrong when the leader - a trained survival expert and ex-SAS soldier - is found dead in the forest of a remote island near Saint Marie. Having ventured off into the wilderness alone and with no other people on the island apart from the trip participants, suspicion soon falls upon them. But with all of the course members providing one another with an alibi, how could any of them have committed the murder? That's what new detective inspector Neville intends to find out. Starring Ralf Little

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: DI Goodman is called in to investigate the death of former surgeon Emma Redding at a retirement home. With an empty packet of sleeping pills beside her body and her room locked from the inside, it looks like an open-and-shut case of suicide. However, the team discovers everything is not as it seems and mounting evidence suggests she may in fact have been poisoned. Then, a blast from Humphrey's past arrives unexpectedly on the island, and looks set to distract him from solving the case. Guest starring Rupert Vansittart, Joanna David, Phil Davis and Michele Dotrice

programme.desc: After a young woman is critically injured from a fall, Murdoch and Ogden suspect her family is complicit in the incident. Medic Julia finds herself having to grapple with her Hippocratic oath. Crime drama, starring Yannick Bisson and Helene Joy

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries

programme.desc: When a body is found during a fox hunt, Murdoch and Brackenreid suspect a group opposed to the blood sport is responsible. Crime drama, starring Yannick Bisson

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: A trail of incriminating evidence in the grisly murder of his unpleasant neighbour leads directly to Murdoch. Crime drama, starring Yannick Bisson and Helene Joy

programme.title: Inspector George Gently
programme.desc: The detective looks into the suspicious death of an old friend and informant. The investigation leads him to the local police station, where it becomes clear the officers are hiding something - and to complicate matters, the disappearance of a teenage boy is also linked to the case. Crime drama, with Martin Shaw, Lee Ingleby and guest stars Neil Pearson, Dean Lennox Kelly and Mark Benton

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The priest encounters a man who intends to solve his father's murder a year earlier with the use of his brand-new invention - a time machine. Fifties-set crime drama, starring Mark Williams

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The priest investigates when a body is found at the stone circle in a polio-stricken village, leading him to conclude that dark forces are involved - and another sacrifice could be imminent. Fifties-set crime drama based on the stories by GK Chesterton, starring Mark Williams

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: When a man is found dead inside a locked bank vault, Father Brown must solve the mystery to save an innocent man from paying the ultimate price. Fifties-set crime drama based on the stories by GK Chesterton, starring Mark Williams as a Roman Catholic priest who attempts to solve various misdemeanours

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The priest finds himself in a seemingly impossible situation when he is told during a confession that Bishop Talbot will be assassinated tomorrow. Fifties-set crime drama based on the stories by GK Chesterton, starring Mark Williams

programme.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway: Private Investigators
programme.desc: The case of a missing manuscript takes a dramatic turn when Frank and Lu find themselves trapped in famous author Greg Alban's house, where no one is who they seem. Drama, starring Mark Benton and Jo Joyner

programme.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway: Private Investigators
programme.desc: Frank and Lu investigate a suspicious death among a team of actors who offer Shakespeare for hire for any occasion, and soon discover there is more backstabbing and tragedy behind the scenes than there is in the performances

programme.title: Father Brown

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Murdoch investigates the death of a man found in a burned-out truck and catches a glimpse of the impossible - a long-gone nemesis back from the dead

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: As the team rushes to save a hostage from an anonymous abductor, they rely on the only witness to her kidnapping: a non-verbal autistic child

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The owner of a hair salon is killed in front of her family, leaving DI Neville Parker and his team stumped when it turns out no one actually saw what happened. Ralf Little stars as the British detective, with Aude Legastelois-Bidé, Tobi Bakare and Shyko Amos

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: DI Goodman is called in to investigate the death of former surgeon Emma Redding at a retirement home. With an empty packet of sleeping pills beside her body and her room locked from the inside, it looks like an open-and-shut case of suicide. However, the team discovers everything is not as it seems and mounting evidence suggests she may in fact have been poisoned. Then, a blast from Humphrey's past arrives unexpectedly on the island, and looks set to distract him from solving the case. Guest starring Rupert Vansittart, Joanna David, Phil Davis and Michele Dotrice

programme.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway: Private Investigators
programme.desc: The case of a missing manuscript takes a dramatic turn when Frank and Lu find themselves trapped in famous author Greg Alban's house, where no one is who they seem. Drama, starring Mark Benton and Jo Joyner

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Millionaire environmentalist and scientist Dan Hagen is shot on his boat while out at sea, and all the evidence points toward a robbery gone wrong, but DI Goodman suspects foul play by a crew member. The team soon realises the group are not as close-knit as they initially seem, and with everyone hiding a secret, the pressure is on to get to the bottom of how and why Dan was killed. The case gives the British detective a sudden desire to become a sailor, while Florence surprises the team with her action hero credentials. Caribbean crime drama, starring Kris Marshall and Joséphine Jobert

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Rob Brydon introduces a seasonal special of the comedy panel game. programme.title: Storage Hunters UK
programme.desc: Sean Kelly and the bidders are in Alton, Hampshire, where Linda is concerned that the other bidders are taking advantage of her superior knowledge and her looks. Meanwhile, Boudicca and Heavy D form more than just a business partnership, and Barry impresses with his dainty footwork

programme.title: Storage Hunters UK
programme.desc: Sean Kelly and the bidders head to Poplar, East London, where Heavy D goes through his blue period after driving the other bidders up the wall with his antics

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: The team considers motoring luxury as Jeremy Clarkson enjoys the Rolls-Royce Phantom and Richard Hammond casts his eye over Rover's classic P5. The search for the Greatest Car continues with a look at the Ford Mustang, Jamie Oliver is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car, and a group of politicians test their mettle in an MG rally car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: The team proves that bad vehicles still exist, Jeremy Clarkson makes the case for the Ford Mustang as the greatest car of all time, and Starsky and Hutch actor David Soul is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Mediterranean with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon travels through Libya, visiting areas of the country devastated by recent fighting as well as one of the world's best preserved ancient Roman cities. He moves on to Tunisia, where he discovers a mountain fortress and meets a man keeping ancient Berber traditions alive, including making olive oil with the help of camels. Finally, he crosses the sea to Sicily, and discovers how the Mafia are attempting to take advantage of declining population numbers

programme.title: Mediterranean with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: The final leg of the journey takes in Morocco, where Simon visits a land borders between Africa and the European Union, and the coast of Spain, taking in the scale of the country's fruit and vegetable industry. He discovers why tourists are actively discouraged from visiting Corsica, and goes diving in waters that have the highest fish population in the Mediterranean

programme.title: Mortimer & Whitehouse: Gone Fishing
programme.desc: Bob and Paul head off for a festive fishing trip to Norway, travelling to Vesteralen and the Lofoten Islands in the Arctic Circle and face a mighty maelstrom. The chain of islands is 1,000 miles north of Oslo and made up of majestic mountains, deep fjords and long, surf-swept beaches, and the pair are on a mission to find a variety of species including cod, halibut and pollock, and the ultimate prize, the hard-fighting coalfish. Along the way Bob surprises Paul with some unique accommodation in the most remote locations they have ever experienced, and the pair enjoy an array of culinary festive delights, including Christmas porridge and traditional Christmas cookies. Later, the duo are joined by Ulrika Jonsson to reminisce about their own very different and personal traditions of Christmas, and Freddie Flintoff presents the hotly contested Employee of the Year and Catch of the Year awards

programme.title: Mortimer & Whitehouse: Gone Fishing
programme.desc: Paul Whitehouse and Bob Mortimer head to a secluded pike lake in Dumfries and Galloway, staying overnight at Spedlins Castle, which is reputed to be haunted. Their second fishing location at Kinmount House has a more refined feel and the boys quickly settle in to fish, discussing how Bob's life has changed since his Gone Fishing journey started so many years ago and the many beautiful places they have seen and fished

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers: Mums Know Best
programme.desc: Si King and Dave Myers investigate the nation's favourite pre-bedtime meals, discovering a recipe for a Portuguese take on fish and chips. They also examine how to make a salmon curry, and learn the formula for creating the perfect meat and potato pie

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers: Mums Know Best
programme.desc: Si King and Dave Myers celebrate traditional Sunday dinners, sampling the delights offered by a second-generation Italian living in east London. They also visit a mother and daughter who have come up with their own take on a regal classic, and meet a woman whose American husband relies on her culinary skill to provide him with a heart-warming taste of home

Joining team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack are EastEnders star June Brown, comedians Aisling Bea and Seann Walsh, and football presenter Adrian Chiles

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Rob Brydon introduces a seasonal special of the comedy panel game. Does one of the contestants really apologise to their boiled egg before smashing its head in? Who apparently writes Christmas cards with their feet? programme.title: Top Gear

The search for the Greatest Car continues with a look at the Ford Mustang, Jamie Oliver is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car, and a group of politicians test their mettle in an MG rally car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: The team proves that bad vehicles still exist, Jeremy Clarkson makes the case for the Ford Mustang as the greatest car of all time, and Starsky and Hutch actor David Soul is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Mediterranean with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon travels through Libya, visiting areas of the country devastated by recent fighting as well as one of the world's best preserved ancient Roman cities. He moves on to Tunisia, where he discovers a mountain fortress and meets a man keeping ancient Berber traditions alive, including making olive oil with the help of camels. Finally, he crosses the sea to Sicily, and discovers how the Mafia are attempting to take advantage of declining population numbers

programme.title: Mediterranean with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: The final leg of the journey takes in Morocco, where Simon visits a land borders between Africa and the European Union, and the coast of Spain, taking in the scale of the country's fruit and vegetable industry. He discovers why tourists are actively discouraged from visiting Corsica, and goes diving in waters that have the highest fish population in the Mediterranean

programme.title: Mortimer & Whitehouse: Gone Fishing
programme.desc: Bob and Paul head off for a festive fishing trip to Norway, travelling to Vesteralen and the Lofoten Islands in the Arctic Circle and face a mighty maelstrom. The chain of islands is 1,000 miles north of Oslo and made up of majestic mountains, deep fjords and long, surf-swept beaches, and the pair are on a mission to find a variety of species including cod, halibut and pollock, and the ultimate prize, the hard-fighting coalfish. Along the way Bob surprises Paul with some unique accommodation in the most remote locations they have ever experienced, and the pair enjoy an array of culinary festive delights, including Christmas porridge and traditional Christmas cookies. Later, the duo are joined by Ulrika Jonsson to reminisce about their own very different and personal traditions of Christmas, and Freddie Flintoff presents the hotly contested Employee of the Year and Catch of the Year awards

programme.title: Mortimer & Whitehouse: Gone Fishing
programme.desc: Paul Whitehouse and Bob Mortimer head to a secluded pike lake in Dumfries and Galloway, staying overnight at Spedlins Castle, which is reputed to be haunted. Their second fishing location at Kinmount House has a more refined feel and the boys quickly settle in to fish, discussing how Bob's life has changed since his Gone Fishing journey started so many years ago and the many beautiful places they have seen and fished

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers: Mums Know Best
programme.desc: Si King and Dave Myers investigate the nation's favourite pre-bedtime meals, discovering a recipe for a Portuguese take on fish and chips. They also examine how to make a salmon curry, and learn the formula for creating the perfect meat and potato pie

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers: Mums Know Best
programme.desc: Si King and Dave Myers celebrate traditional Sunday dinners, sampling the delights offered by a second-generation Italian living in east London. They also visit a mother and daughter who have come up with their own take on a regal classic, and meet a woman whose American husband relies on her culinary skill to provide him with a heart-warming taste of home

programme.desc: The roguish antiques dealer offers to track down a conman after Charlie is swindled out of a china figurine. He also helps Charlotte find the thieves who've robbed her house. Drama, guest starring Lionel Jeffries and Eve Matheson

programme.desc: The dealer falls under the suspicion of an ambitious and ruthless police officer, who suspects he is handling stolen European furniture. programme.title: Lovejoy
programme.desc: The roguish antiques dealer whisks Charlotte away for a weekend in Wales, but before long they find themselves hunting for a murderer and a rare Celtic cross. Drama, starring Ian McShane and Caroline Langrishe

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: A man suspected of killing a police officer is seen near Kembleford and Mallory is determined to catch him, but he has to ask the sleuthing priest for help when disaster strikes

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: The body of a missing computer expert turns up in a hospital morgue under a false name, so the team reopens the investigation into his disappearance. The dead man worked for the Metropolitan Police, giving him access to a great deal of sensitive information - added to which, he was in contact with a group of online hackers. But he died of natural causes - so why was his body hidden, and by who? As the seasoned detectives unravel the mystery, Brian struggles to accept Steve as the new Ucos member, forcing Esther to intervene. Guest starring Sarah Smart and Alex Jennings

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: The death of a teenage tennis star occupies the team when it is suggested her suicide jump two years earlier was anything but. They soon find several people with motives for her murder, including her coach Nick and agent Anthony, but it seems the one with the most to benefit from the girl's demise was her great rival Fawn Brammall - a shy and subdued player who proves difficult to question. Meanwhile, Gerry wonders if he did enough to encourage his own daughter's sporting ambitions and Brian hatches a plan to turn his dog into a movie star. Detective drama, guest starring Tamzin Outhwaite and Alexei Sayle

programme.title: Signora Volpe
programme.desc: Sylvia is abducted by an adversary from her past, and Riva and her family are forced to heal long-standing grudges and work together to find her

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.desc: Shepherd and his team investigate when Peggy Froome, a devoted fan of the '80s band Stolen Arrow, falls to her death from a bell tower. The detective must dig into the band's secrets and dark history to find the actual cause of the victim's demise. Neill Rea stars

programme.title: Monsieur Spade
programme.desc: The tragedy of the horrific murders are felt by all in the town. Pulled out of retirement, Spade begins to investigate, while Teresa keeps her cards close to her chest

programme.title: The Last Detective
programme.desc: Dangerous investigates the disappearance of a man whose wife seems strangely unconcerned about his whereabouts, and two ballroom-dancing regulars discover a tragic secret. Julia McKenzie and Sian Phillips guest star, with Peter Davison and Sean Hughes

Trixie supports her as she discovers she has a rare condition, but the diagnosis could have far more devastating repercussions than either of them could have imagine. Sister Frances confronts her fear of public speaking, Lucille has a new romance in her life, and a father-to-be experiences strange pains similar to his wife's pregnancy symptoms

With John Bowler and Ray Stevenson

In this first episode, the mysterious death of a pensioner leaves a few unanswered questions, but Hetty smells a rat and with her young assistant Geoffrey, sets about solving the mystery the police have little interest in. Drama, also starring Dominic Monaghan and David Benfield. First broadcast in 1996

She soon stumbles across the post-mortem report and realises that the body is not that of her ex-colleague. Assisted by Dr Eva Vasquez and fired up with the idea that Luisa might still be alive, Nikki and Jack trace her last-known movements and are led to a farm where a cartel massacre was carried out. Crime drama, starring Emilia Fox

programme.title: Patagonia: Earth's Secret Paradise
programme.desc: Life in the treacherous seas that surround the South American wilderness. The 4,000-mile coast stretches from the cold waters of Cape Horn - where rockhopper penguins overcome huge challenges to raise their young - to the far north's much warmer climate, where huge elephant seals battle for position in the heat of the desert. Orcas ram-raid the beaches, grabbing seal pups to feed their young, and fishermen are also incentivised to gather the sea's bounty. Narrated by Santiago Cabrera

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: The naturalist continues to explore the secrets behind evolution, this time focusing on the animal kingdom's bizarre hybrids, including the 'pizzly bear', a cross between a polar bear and a grizzly, which is thought to have come into being as a result of global warming. He also covers the killer bee brought into existence due to the transfer of African bees to South America

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Great Canal Journeys
programme.desc: Timothy West and Prunella Scales explore Argentina's waterways in a traditional cargo boat, venturing into a labyrinth of canals and rivers in the jungles outside Buenos Aires. They visit the jungle town of Tigre and a remote enclave of Anglo Argentines, who still toast the Queen, as well as learning more about the war that swept the country in the 1970s and performing a traditional dance

programme.title: Great Canal Journeys
programme.desc: Timothy West and Prunella Scales navigate the Lancaster Canal, an early masterpiece that wends its way north through the city of Lancaster and along the coast at Morecambe Bay. The waterway is largely rural, running through rolling open countryside and deep woods and also boasts one of the most elegant pieces of canal architecture in the country in the Lune Aqueduct. When their journey reaches Carnforth, Tim and Pru visit its train station, which was used as the key location in David Lean's classic film Brief Encounter. Long-forgotten memories rise to the surface for Pru as she visits the lakeland village of Near Sawrey, where her family lived during much of the Second World War and as a child she once saw Beatrix Potter

programme.title: Great Canal Journeys
programme.desc: Timothy West and Prunella Scales explore Canada's Rideau Canal, which travels 125 miles through the backwoods of Ontario, connecting Lake Ontario with the city of Ottawa. Along the way, they visit Fort Henry and navigate the famous Ottawa lock, and meet the descendants of the Algonquin guides who helped with the original construction

programme.title: Great Canal Journeys
programme.desc: Prunella Scales and Timothy West embark on a final canal journey in the first of two programmes exploring Vietnam and Cambodia. The trip begins in the limestone islands of Halong Bay, before travelling along the Red River to Hanoi and the ancient citadel of Hoa Lu. They also attend the famous lantern festival in the trading port of Hoi An

programme.title: Great Canal Journeys
programme.desc: Timothy West and Prunella Scales explore Argentina's waterways in a traditional cargo boat, venturing into a labyrinth of canals and rivers in the jungles outside Buenos Aires. They visit the jungle town of Tigre and a remote enclave of Anglo Argentines, who still toast the Queen, as well as learning more about the war that swept the country in the 1970s and performing a traditional dance

programme.title: Great Canal Journeys
programme.desc: Timothy West and Prunella Scales navigate the Lancaster Canal, an early masterpiece that wends its way north through the city of Lancaster and along the coast at Morecambe Bay. The waterway is largely rural, running through rolling open countryside and deep woods and also boasts one of the most elegant pieces of canal architecture in the country in the Lune Aqueduct. When their journey reaches Carnforth, Tim and Pru visit its train station, which was used as the key location in David Lean's classic film Brief Encounter. Long-forgotten memories rise to the surface for Pru as she visits the lakeland village of Near Sawrey, where her family lived during much of the Second World War and as a child she once saw Beatrix Potter

programme.title: Patagonia: Earth's Secret Paradise
programme.desc: The documentary offering a glimpse into the rarely seen South American wilderness continues, this time following the path of the relentless wind sweeping east through Patagonia's dry desert from the Andes' peaks. The programme reveals a weird world of maras - a large relative of the guinea pig - and penguins, and witnesses the first faltering steps of baby guanacos - Patagonia's very own camels. Cameras also observe the people who have taken on this inhospitable environment and carved out a home for themselves. Santiago Cabrera narrates

programme.title: Patagonia: Earth's Secret Paradise
programme.desc: Life in the treacherous seas that surround the South American wilderness. The 4,000-mile coast stretches from the cold waters of Cape Horn - where rockhopper penguins overcome huge challenges to raise their young - to the far north's much warmer climate, where huge elephant seals battle for position in the heat of the desert. Orcas ram-raid the beaches, grabbing seal pups to feed their young, and fishermen are also incentivised to gather the sea's bounty. Narrated by Santiago Cabrera

programme.title: A Very British Murder with Lucy Worsley
programme.desc: An examination of the dark history behind Britain's fascination with murder, beginning with historian and curator Lucy Worsley exploring how notorious killings were transformed into popular entertainment in the first half of the 19th century

programme.title: A Very British Murder with Lucy Worsley
programme.desc: In the second programme, the historian explores how science and detection influenced the popular culture of murder during Victorian times. Writers including Charles Dickens and Wilkie Collins were fascinated by grisly crimes, and the literary genre that came out of it captured the imagination of readers. The presenter also reveals that when Jack the Ripper began his reign of terror in London at the same time Robert Louis Stevenson's Dr Jekyll and Mr Hyde was published, the idea of the serial killer was introduced to the British public

programme.title: A Very British Murder with Lucy Worsley
programme.desc: The historian tells the story of one of the first high-profile killers - Dr Crippen, who was hanged in 1910 for poisoning and dismembering his wife - before turning her attention to the interwar period, when detective fiction reached the peak of its popularity at the hands of authors Agatha Christie and Dorothy L Sayers. After undergoing the elaborate initiation ceremony of the Detection Club, which was set up by a group of British writers in 1930, Lucy considers how Alfred Hitchcock's films and Graham Greene's books eclipsed the traditional murder-mystery story in the depiction of homicide

programme.title: Agatha Christie: Lucy Worsley on the Mystery Queen
programme.desc: The historian investigates the complex factors that shaped the dark imagination of a refined Devonshire lady, discovering family secrets and a childhood haunted by a sinister figure. Focusing on the first third of Agatha Christie's life, this episode unearths the surprising roots of her most compelling themes, the inspiration for some of her greatest creations, and the secrets that the enigmatic Christie herself kept carefully hidden from public view

programme.title: Agatha Christie: Lucy Worsley on the Mystery Queen
programme.desc: On the evening of December 3, 1926, Agatha Christie left her home in Sunningdale, Berkshire, in her Morris Cowley. Ten days later, Agatha was discovered in a hotel in Harrogate, claiming to have lost her memory. Lucy Worsley delves into this traumatic, watershed moment in Christie's life. She visits the key locations, from the chalk pit where Agatha crashed her car to Abney Hall, the grand house where she took refuge (and which would inspire several of her books)

programme.title: Patagonia: Earth's Secret Paradise
programme.desc: The documentary offering a glimpse into the rarely seen South American wilderness continues, this time following the path of the relentless wind sweeping east through Patagonia's dry desert from the Andes' peaks. The programme reveals a weird world of maras - a large relative of the guinea pig - and penguins, and witnesses the first faltering steps of baby guanacos - Patagonia's very own camels. Cameras also observe the people who have taken on this inhospitable environment and carved out a home for themselves. Santiago Cabrera narrates

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Billy wrestles with the prospect of fatherhood as Julie prepares to give birth. A devastated Adrian prepares to visit the unemployment agency, but is reassured by Joey's guidance of such occasions. Comedy, starring Nick Conway, Jonathon Morris and Peter Howitt

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Joey promises Billy the use of his Jaguar, and Jack and Adrian run into trouble with some local thugs when a deal goes wrong

programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.desc: Arkwright attends a former customer's funeral, leaving Granville in charge of the store. However, the miserly shopkeeper has difficulty trusting his nephew to run it properly

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lee promises to stop treating Lucy's flat as if he owns it, but neglects to mention he has already let out the property to a film director, who is paying him £500 to use it while she is at work. Comedy, starring Lee Mack and Sally Bretton

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: In a bid to impress Lucy, Lee prepares for a 10km fun run, only to injure himself at the start of his training. The aspiring athlete tries to hide the mishap from his flatmate and gets a secret sports massage, which inevitably leads to more trouble. Comedy, starring Lee Mack and Sally Bretton

programme.title: Avoidance
programme.desc: Jonathan and Claire get trapped in a dinner party from hell, while Dan and Courtney fail at 'gentle parenting' when tricked into looking after a friend's children. Comedy, with Romesh Ranganathan, Jessica Knappett, Mandeep Dhillon and Lisa McGrillis

programme.title: Don't Wait Up
programme.desc: Toby makes an appearance on TV to discuss private practice. Nigel Havers and Tony Britton star

programme.title: Avoidance
programme.desc: On a trip to Yorkshire, Claire forces Jonathan to lie to her parents about their break-up, a lie that goes way too far. Dan and Courtney go on respective mum's and dad's nights out. The professor calls Dan asking for an answer on the job, so she seeks advice from her fellow 'dads'. The nights are both very different, but Courtney's ends with a shock revelation as Dan makes a decision about her dream job. Comedy, guest starring Paula Wilcox, with Romesh Ranganathan, Jessica Knappett and Aisling Bea

programme.title: Avoidance
programme.desc: It's the day of Dan's baby shower and Jonathan tries to end things with Megan before Claire finds out - only for a dead cat to foil his plan. The reality of having a baby alongside Dan's new job sends Courtney spiralling. Comedy, with Romesh Ranganathan and Jessica Knappett

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: Dermot is sacked for dangling a customer by the ankles, while Gary, on the other hand, is offered a new post. However, he has difficulty breaking the news to George and Anthea. Laddish comedy, starring Harry Enfield and Martin Clunes

programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.desc: Roy Clarke's comedy, starring Ronnie Barker and David Jason. Tight-fisted shopkeeper Arkwright purchases fire-damaged stock, only to find all the tins have lost their labels

programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.desc: Granville tries to persuade Arkwright to buy a van, as he is fed up with having to struggle doing the rounds with the shop's outdated delivery bike. He is pleasantly surprised when his skinflint uncle agrees - until he takes the vehicle out on the road. Comedy, starring Ronnie Barker and David Jason

programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.desc: Arkwright feels neglected by Nurse Gladys Emmanuel, and decides to feign an illness in an attempt to get her undivided attention, but she soon sees through the ruse

programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.desc: Following a break-in, Arkwright decides to buy a guard dog to keep away potential burglars. Unfortunately, his new investment also scares off the customers

programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.desc: Arkwright attends a former customer's funeral, leaving Granville in charge of the store. However, the miserly shopkeeper has difficulty trusting his nephew to run it properly

programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.desc: Miserly shopkeeper Arkwright organises a sales drive in a bid to boost profits - and rid himself of the vast consignment of apples he has mistakenly ordered. An unhappy Granville is persuaded to demonstrate the merchandise. Classic comedy, starring Ronnie Barker and David Jason

programme.title: Still Open All Hours
programme.desc: David Jason returns as Granville in this follow-up to Roy Clarke's popular comedy Open All Hours, as he re-opens the doors of the nation's favourite corner shop. In the opening episode, Arkwright's protege finds an old mangle in the yard - and wonders how he can best put it to use. Meanwhile, Beth continues to pressure Leroy to find a date for her best friend, Ruby, who has been suspended at work. Elsewhere, Eric and Cyril tutor Mr Newbold in the art of romance - and how to get closer to Mrs Rossi. Co-starring James Baxter, Johnny Vegas and Katie Redford
